headline: 周一鳴：警方線上線下全方位監測　精準打擊危害國家安全行為
excerpt:
國務院新聞辦公室早前發布《「一國兩制」下香港維護國家安全的實踐》白皮書。警務處處長周一鳴接受報章訪問時指出，白皮書為特區政府開展維護國家安全工作、以高水平安全護航「一國兩制」事業高質量發展，提供了重要指引與根本遵循。他強調，警隊繼續以情報主導為核心，主動針對打擊危害國安的人員及案件；教育層面則借助國家安全教育日契機，並於日常工作持續推廣國安教育，增強市民的國民身份認同。

白皮書第三部分列出「香港特別行政區切實履行維護國家安全的憲制責任」，周一鳴強調，警隊一直打擊違法分子，恪守有法必依、執法必嚴、違法必究的原則。他重申，香港國安法的規管對象僅針對極少數涉嫌危害國家安全的人士。自國安法實施 6年以來，警方共拘捕 385人，當中逾半數已被檢控，充分證明受規管的只是少數心懷不軌、企圖破壞國家安全的人士。

周一鳴指出，仍有不法分子或心懷不軌者利用各種機會滲透，企圖大肆宣揚對祖國的無證據指控，對抗行為從未停止。至於香港的本土恐怖主義是否仍存在暗湧，他透露警方將持續進行線上線下全方位監測，以情報主導模式，精準打擊危害國家安全行為，務求將維護國安的工作做得更扎實。

警方於4月12日會在夏慤花園舉
summary_zh: 警務處處長周一鳴表示，警方將採用情報主導方式，在線上線下全方位監測，精準打擊危害國家安全行為。

headline: 屯門醫院完成全港首宗磁波刀治療震顫型柏金遜症個案
excerpt:
屯門醫院上月完成全港首宗以磁波刀治療震顫型柏金遜症的個案，病人在無創及毋須麻醉下接受治療，手震等震顫情況即時改善，身體狀況大致回復正常。院方說，有關治療方法，目前仍處於臨床研究階段，預計兩年內合共可治療40名經來自不同醫院聯網的患者，作為研究數據的基礎。院方會評估治療成效，確立標準化治療，再有序推展使用。

屯門醫院腦神經外科副顧問醫生何文傑說，接受治療的病人需要躺臥在磁力共振儀器，醫生會以高強度的超聲波穿透病人的頭骨，精準聚焦腦部引發震顫的目標組織，以消融方式阻斷異常的神經訊號，治療期間可以即時測試成效及有否副作用，全程需時大約3小時。

屯門醫院指出，並非所有患者都適合接受磁波刀治療，要符合特定條件，包括要有合適骨頭密度及無幽閉恐懼等。屯門醫院腦神經外科顧問醫生羅興源補充說，外國數據顯示，大約有兩成病人接受治療一年後會復發，但仍有方法可以減輕病情。他指出，磁波刀治療的效果，相較傳統的微創手術「射頻消融術」好，能令病人有如「時光倒流」，身體的狀況恢復得較好，對精神健康亦有好處。

上月接受治療的是一名54歲的男病人，從院方播放治療片段，看到張先生拿著筆的手，由原先有震顫變為沒有震動。
summary_zh: 屯門醫院完成香港首宗磁波刀治療震顫型柏金遜症個案，患者無需麻醉在非侵入性治療下手震即時改善。

headline: 沙田新城市廣場男子偷去店舖三件女裝後逃去
excerpt:
沙田發生店舖盜竊案，一名男子晚上約7時在新城市廣場一間服裝店，偷走3件女裝衣服，總值約1300元。疑犯被保安截停後用鎅刀指向自己，保安其後將他放行，疑犯之後逃去。

警方表示，正追緝一名年約30歲、高約1.75米的男子，他犯案時身穿白色上衣、黑色長褲、有黑色斜孭袋。



編輯：陳曉慶
summary_zh: 沙田新城市廣場發生店舖盜竊案，男子偷走3件女裝後持刀威脅保安逃逸。

headline: 房署預備明日清晨開始移除倒塌天秤　料工序周二早上7時前完成
excerpt:
葵涌大窩口道一個公屋地盤早前發生天秤倒塌事件，一名天秤操作員死亡。大窩口道來回方向，介乎芷葵樓與茵葵樓之間的全線仍然封閉。房屋署回覆查詢時表示，預備於明日清晨展開移除天秤工作，預計所有工序將於星期二早上7時前完成，屆時受影響的路段將可解封。

署方表示，工程團隊經與承建商詳細商討，並與相關政府部門確認完成搜證工作後，今早進行有關工程所需的一系列準備工作，包括架設兩部大型吊運車，移除天秤工作進行期間，介乎芷葵樓與茵葵樓之間的一段大窩口道仍會繼續封閉，禁止所有車輛駛入，同時附近一帶的行人路範圍亦會禁止行人進入。

運輸署表示，部分巴士路線仍需改道行駛，包括九巴第32H及43號線；龍運第A32及NA32號線；城巴第930及N930號線。個別巴士站亦有所調整。至於新界專線小巴第313號線仍需改道行駛。 



編輯：陳曉慶
summary_zh: 房屋署預備明日清晨移除葵涌大窩口道公屋地盤倒塌天秤，料周二早上7時前完成工序後解封受影響路段。

headline: 逾7.2萬人入場觀賞打吡大賽創新高　白鷺金剛破紀錄時間勝出
excerpt:
沙田馬場舉行香港打吡大賽，吸引逾7萬2千人到沙田及跑馬地馬場觀賽，創下歷來香港打吡大賽新高，當中內地及海外旅客入場人數刷新紀錄，超過1萬1千人，較去年增加27.8%。

馬會表示，投注額錄得16億7800萬港元，是歷來香港打吡大賽第二高，全球匯合彩池投注額超過5億港元，刷新單日10場賽事的紀錄。

香港打吡大賽是香港歷史最悠久的賽事之一，今年舉行第149屆賽事，均由4歲馬匹參賽，今日共有14匹賽駒參賽，最終由布文策騎的「白鷺金剛」以1分59秒43奪得冠軍，成為歷來打吡大賽最快完成時間，較舊紀錄1分59秒85快近半秒。



編輯：陳曉慶
summary_zh: 香港打吡大賽吸引逾7.2萬人入場創歷史新高，內地及海外旅客超1.1萬人；「白鷺金剛」以1分59秒43勇奪冠軍，刷新賽事最快時間紀錄。

headline: 大埔男子涉販運危險藥物　警方檢獲約21萬元懷疑毒品
excerpt:
警方今日在大埔洞梓山路一間村屋內，檢獲兩包共重約1公斤的懷疑大麻花及一批懷疑毒品包裝工具，屋內59歲男子涉嫌販運危險藥物被捕。行動中檢獲的懷疑毒品市值約21萬元。

警方表示，被捕人將會被落案控告一項販運危險物罪，案件將於本月24日上午在粉嶺裁判法院提堂。



編輯：陳曉慶
summary_zh: 警方在大埔村屋檢獲約21萬元懷疑毒品，拘捕涉嫌販運危險藥物的59歲男子。

headline: 北角仁德大廈一個單位發生火警3人傷
excerpt:
北角春秧街仁德大廈一個單位傍晚發生火警，3人受傷，清醒送院。

警方在下午約5時半接報，大廈有單位起火，消防出動一條喉和一隊煙帽隊灌救，在下午約6時19分將火救熄。一名女子報稱吸入濃煙不適，另外有1男1女受傷，3人被送往東區醫院治理。



編輯：陳曉慶
summary_zh: 北角仁德大廈一單位傍晚發生火警，消防成功撲滅火勢，3人受傷送院治療。

headline: 何永賢指簡樸房核證工作可由註冊建築師、專業工程師或測量師進行
excerpt:
房屋局局長何永賢表示，簡樸房的核證工作，可由註冊建築師、註冊專業工程師、註冊專業測量師進行。

何永賢在社交平台表示，房屋局團隊早前在深水埗舉行簡介會時，有業主查詢是否要聘請多名不同專業人士作核證工作，副局長戴尚誠和香港測量師學會副會長謝志堅當時指出，只需聘請一位指明專業人士。她提醒業主若有疑問，亦可以向擬聘請的專業人士先問清楚。



編輯：陳曉慶
summary_zh: 房屋局局長何永賢澄清簡樸房核證工作可由註冊建築師、專業工程師或測量師任一進行，毋須聘請多名專業人士。

headline: 警方打擊非法改裝及超速等違例事項　扣留七輛私家車和電單車
excerpt:
警方在大美督、鹿頸路及新娘潭路一帶，截查約40輛懷疑涉及非法改裝的私家車及電單車。經初步檢驗後，其中兩輛私家車及5輛電單車懷疑經非法改裝，涉嫌違反規例，涉案車輛已被扣留於大欖涌車輛檢驗中心待進一步檢驗。另外亦向10部涉事車輛發出欠妥車輛報告。

新界北總區交通部執行及管制組特遣隊昨日起一連兩日加強執法打擊交通違例事項，重點打擊非法改裝、超速駕駛等。警方表示，行動中偵測到約170輛車輛超速行駛，將向有關司機發出告票。同時就其他交通違例事項共發出約80張定額罰款通知書。



編輯：陳曉慶
summary_zh: 香港警方在新界北進行交通執法行動，打擊非法改裝及超速違例，扣留七輛涉嫌違規的私家車和電單車。

headline: 【重溫】2026年3月22日新聞天地
excerpt: 詳盡報道本地時事、大中華消息、國際局勢等新聞，緊貼最新熱話。
summary_zh: 這是一期新聞天地節目重溫，詳盡報道2026年3月22日的本地時事、大中華消息及國際局勢等新聞熱話。

headline: 陳國基︰推動文化旅遊深度融合屬「十五五」規劃重要方向
excerpt:
政務司司長陳國基表示，今年是國家「十五五」規劃開局之年，推動文化和旅遊深度融合，促進中華文化傳承，是其中一個重要發展方向。

香港中樂團下午在啟德體育園舉辦本年度「國際笙簧節」首個大型活動「笙簧馬拉松」，陳國基出席活動開幕式並致辭，指笙簧馬拉松是文旅融合的最佳示範，活動雲集中、西方各類簧片樂器愛好者同台演奏，參加者能以音樂會友，更攜手締造最多人吹奏笙簧樂器的世界紀錄，將音樂的歡樂由舞台帶到社區，由香港傳遍世界。

陳國基又說，期待香港中樂團繼續推陳出新，以高品質的文化旅遊活動，打造具影響力的國際品牌，向世界展示中華文化的深厚底蘊和創新活力，進一步深化國際文化交流合作，協助鞏固香港作為中外文化藝術交流樞紐的獨特地位。



編輯：陳曉慶
summary_zh: 政務司司長陳國基表示，推動文化旅遊深度融合是國家「十五五」規劃的重要方向，並出席香港中樂團「笙簧馬拉松」活動，讚揚其為文旅融合的典範。

headline: 紅磡近億元金條盜竊案　被捕5人明早提堂
excerpt:
紅磡一間公司辦公室日前發生的金條失竊案，被捕的5名男女，已被暫控一項盜竊罪，明日上午在九龍城裁判法院提堂。

案發於上星期五下午，紅磡崇安街一個辦公室內，進行一宗黃金交易期間，被盜去73條、約值9300萬元的金條，5名疑犯事後登上私家車逃去，當晚被警方拘捕，並起回全數涉案金條。



編輯：陳曉慶
summary_zh: 紅磡公司辦公室發生近億元金條盜竊案，5名疑犯已被拘捕並起回全數失竊金條，將於明日上午在九龍城裁判法院提堂。

headline: 陳茂波：本港須加速高質量發展　讓國際更了解獨特優勢與機遇
excerpt:
財政司司長陳茂波，在北京出席中國發展高層論壇2026年年會，並在「全球綠色低碳轉型與可持續發展為專題研討會」發言。

另外，陳茂波在網誌表示，國家的部委和金融監管機構，高度重視及大力支持香港，在國家金融強國建設上的獨特功能和積極作用。而本港必須要抓緊時機窗口，加速自身高質量發展，讓國際社會更了解香港的獨特優勢與機遇。



編輯：王濱南
summary_zh: 財政司司長陳茂波在北京出席中國發展高層論壇，強調香港須加速高質量發展，向國際展示香港獨特優勢。

headline: 蔡若蓮冀辦學團體未來更主動考慮合併升級
excerpt:
有15間資助小學下學年獲「派0班」。教育局局長蔡若蓮說，希望未來辦學團體會更主動，考慮合併升級，而不是去到1班或0班時才去想。

蔡若蓮又說，如果突然有大量非本地學生湧來香港，當局可以研究，是否讓資助學校多收取一些非本地生，但是現階段就言之尚早。



編輯：劉景輝
summary_zh: 教育局局長蔡若蓮表示，希望辦學團體主動考慮合併升級，而非被迫在招生人數過少時才採取行動；同時提及如非本地學生大幅增加，當局可研究資助學校招收更多非本地生的可能性。

headline: 馬鞍山郊野公園有人行山時疑跌倒受傷送院
excerpt:
馬鞍山郊野公園有女子行山期間懷疑跌倒受傷，送院治理。

警方中午12時許接獲一名男子報案，指一名同行女友人，在馬鞍山郊野公園行山時懷疑跌倒，頭部流血。消防員於雁谷迷徑尋獲事主，她由政府飛行服務隊直升機吊起，送往東區醫院救治。



編輯：陳曉慶
summary_zh: 馬鞍山郊野公園一名女子行山時疑似跌倒受傷，頭部流血，由直升機送往東區醫院治理。

headline: 滙豐︰中國經濟為新興產業帶來蓬勃生機　將繼續投入中國市場
excerpt:
中國發展高層論壇2026年年會在北京開幕，滙豐行政總裁艾橋智表示，中國經濟為新興產業帶來蓬勃生機，亦具備實現更大突破的實力，中國企業出海步伐不斷加速，對外直接投資的增長勢頭強勁，凸顯中國作為全球投資大國日益增強的影響力，滙豐作為在華投資最多的國際金融機構之一，將繼續投入中國市場，協助海外客戶捕捉中國機遇，助力中國企業拓展全球市場。 

艾橋智指出，貿易格局的結構性變化帶來新的機遇，同時關稅壁壘、地緣政治及軍事衝突帶來的不確定性不斷加劇，在全球經濟新常態下，中國企業在「走出去」的過程中面臨著新的挑戰和需求，金融機構需要緊貼中資企業出海步伐，加快構建全球聯動網絡，並針對企業在國際化過程中不同發展階段的需求，為它們定制一體化的創新金融解決方案。

艾橋智又指出，加快提升香港國際金融中心地位和離岸人民幣樞紐功能，將發揮重要作用，可進一步暢通內地與香港金融市場各類聯通機制間的銜接，為國際投資者提供更便捷高效的風險管理工具和產品。



編輯：汪溟曦
summary_zh: 滙豐行政總裁艾橋智於中國發展高層論壇表示，中國經濟為新興產業帶來蓬勃生機，滙豐將繼續投入中國市場，並助力中國企業出海拓展全球市場。

headline: 黃坤明稱要深化與港澳務實合作　靳磊：深圳精心辦好APEC會議
excerpt:
中央批准靳磊出任廣東省委常委、深圳市委書記，免去孟凡利的深圳市委書記職務。

廣東省委書記黃坤明表示，今次職務調整是以國家主席習近平爲核心的黨中央，從工作大局和廣東省、深圳市領導班子實際出發作出的决定，充分體現對廣東省、深圳市的親切關懷和對省市領導班子建設的高度重視，要堅決按照總書記、黨中央要求，持續加強領導班子和幹部隊伍建設，把廣東的事、深圳的事辦好，奮力在推進中國式現代化建設中走在前列。他又表示，要深度參與粵港澳大灣區建設，加快推進基礎設施「硬聯通」、規則機制「軟聯通」，切實抓好前海、河套等重大合作平台建設，深化與香港、澳門的務實合作，更好實現優勢疊加、共贏發展。

靳磊表示，完全擁護、堅决服從黨中央的决定。他表示，在「十五五」開局起步的關鍵時刻來到深圳工作，深感責任重大，使命光榮，將堅定築牢絕對忠誠，深入學習貫徹習近平對廣東、深圳系列重要講話和重要指示精神，堅定擁護「兩個確立」、堅決做到「兩個維護」，堅定推動高質量發展，加快發展新質生産力，做強粵港澳大灣區核心引擎功能，抓緊抓實「百縣千鎮萬村高質量發展工程」，精心服務辦好APEC會議，奮力增創新優勢、實現新突破。



編輯：陳曉
summary_zh: 中央批准靳磊任深圳市委書記，黃坤明表示要深化粵港澳合作；靳磊誓言精心辦好APEC會議，推動高質量發展。

headline: 李強 : 「十五五」規劃綱要是世界發展的「新機遇」
excerpt:
國務院總理李強在北京出席中國發展高層論壇2026年年會開幕式並發表主旨演講。李強說，「十五五」規劃綱要不僅是中國發展的「新藍圖」，也是世界發展的「新機遇」，中國將著力推動高質量發展，努力保持經濟穩定增長，同時繼續打造良好營商環境，全面落實外資企業國民待遇，讓各國來華企業安心發展、大展宏圖。

李強又表示，保護主義不是解決問題的靈丹妙藥，中方反對無序、非理性的惡性競爭，中方將繼續努力維護公平競爭的市場秩序，願與各方加強溝通協作，共促全球產供鏈的穩定與安全。



編輯：王濱南
summary_zh: 李強總理在中國發展高層論壇表示，「十五五」規劃綱要既是中國發展新藍圖，也是世界發展新機遇，強調將推動高質量發展、優化營商環境，反對保護主義。

headline: 靳磊出任深圳市委書記
excerpt:
中央批准靳磊出任廣東省委常委、深圳市委書記，免去孟凡利的深圳市委書記職務。

現年56歲的靳磊，曾任四川省委常委、組織部部長，以及省委黨校四川行政學院、長征幹部學院院長。

至於60歲的孟凡利，早前已獲晉升為廣東省省長。



編輯：汪溟曦
summary_zh: 中央批准靳磊出任深圳市委書記，接替晉升為廣東省省長的孟凡利。

headline: 李強：合力做大全球經貿蛋糕　「十五五」規劃是世界發展新機遇
excerpt:
在北京，國務院總理李強出席中國發展高層論壇2026年年會開幕式，並發表主旨演講，對如何看待市場、發展和未來分享三點想法。

李強提到，市場已成稀缺資源，但又可以被不斷創造；保護主義不是解決問題的靈丹妙藥，應當堅持開放、開拓精神，擴大自由貿易、積極推動創新。中國的進出口是在規則框架下進行的公平貿易，中方將堅定不移推進高水平對外開放，進口更多國外優質商品，同各方一道推動貿易優化平衡發展，合力做大全球經貿蛋糕。

李強認為，發展必然伴隨競爭，但良性競合可以帶來互利共贏；以積極心態看待競爭，以務實舉措推進合作，才能相互賦能、取長補短。中國相關產業的競爭優勢不是靠補貼和保護取得，中方反對無序、非理性的惡性競爭，但在市場經濟條件下，良性的競爭能夠激發出更大發展動力。中方將繼續努力維護公平競爭的市場秩序，願同各方加強溝通協作，共促全球產供鏈的穩定與安全。

李強指出，中國致力於做世界的「確定性基石」和「穩定性港灣」。他說「十五五」規劃綱要不僅是中國發展的「新藍圖」，也是世界發展的「新機遇」。中國將著力推動高質量發展，努力保持經濟穩定增長，同時繼續打造良好營商環境，全面落實外資企業國民待遇，讓各國來華
summary_zh: 國務院總理李強出席中國發展高層論壇，強調市場、發展和未來三大議題，呼籲各方合力做大全球經貿蛋糕，並表示「十五五」規劃是世界發展新機遇。

headline: 4月13日起調整郵費　本地信件由2.2元調整至2.4元
summary_zh: 香港郵政宣布自4月13日起調整郵費，本地信件費用由2.2元調升至2.4元。

headline: 科大招募6千名居家長者免費檢測　及早識別輕度認知障礙
excerpt:
香港科技大學宣布推出為期5年的「長者護腦社區計劃」，為基層長者提供阿爾茲海默症及輕度認知障礙的免費早期檢測，招募6千名60至75歲的居家長者參與檢測，希望及早識別和介入。

計劃由科大牽頭及策劃，聯同東華學院及10多間社福機構，透過轄下逾40間社區或長者中心進行招募，預料計劃可惠及約3萬人，包括照顧者。

有關計劃將利用科大研發的血液檢測技術做檢測，流程分為4個階段，參加者須接受認知能力評估、常規血液檢驗，因應個別情況，可能安排參加者進行生物標記評估及腦部影像掃描等檢測，以識別早期阿爾茲海默症及輕度認知障礙的跡象。

科大校長兼InnoHK香港神經退行性疾病中心主任葉玉如表示，透過計劃可將全球首創的血液多蛋白標誌物測試，由臨床應用拓展至社區層面。她解釋說，這項創新技術整合與阿爾茲海默症相關多個生物通路的血液蛋白生物標記，以低入侵性方式實現更早期檢測，為受影響家庭爭取寶貴診治時間，讓他們能夠及早規劃照顧方案、尋求支援，有望改變腦部健康的發展軌跡。

葉玉如認為，計劃有助延緩認知功能退化，透過為有需要長者轉介，可及時涵接醫療體系包括診治等，亦可促進腦退化相關疾病的照護，推動先進醫療服務普及
summary_zh: 香港科技大學推出5年「長者護腦社區計劃」，招募6千名居家長者免費檢測，利用自主研發血液檢測技術及早識別阿爾茲海默症和輕度認知障礙。

headline: 滬指半日跌逾2%　貴金屬及保險股受壓
excerpt:
滬深股市半日跌逾2%，貴金屬股大跌，赤峰黃金A股跌停板；豬肉、旅遊、保險等股份下跌。煤炭、油氣、太空光伏等股份逆市上升。

深證成份指數報13515點，跌351點，跌幅2.53%。

創業板指數報3270點，跌81點，跌幅2.44%。



編輯：李意琴
summary_zh: 滬深股市半日跌逾2%，上證綜合指數失守3900點，貴金屬及保險股受壓。

headline: Hong Kong’s Henderson Land trims dividend as Iran, mainland China cloud outlook
excerpt:
Major Hong Kong developers Henderson Land Development and Kerry Properties both reported mixed 2025 results, with stronger home sales partly offsetting softer rental income and a subdued commercial property market.
The earnings underscored how the city’s developers are shifting focus towards projects that can still generate cash flow, mainly high-end housing in Hong Kong and top-tier mainland cities, while waiting for offices and retail to recover.
Recent geopolitical tensions, including the...
full_text:
The earnings underscored how the city’s developers are shifting focus towards projects that can still generate cash flow, mainly high-end housing in Hong Kong and top-tier mainland cities, while waiting for offices and retail to recover.

Recent geopolitical tensions, including the Iran war, had created “significant economic uncertainties”, prompting Henderson to adopt a more prudent financial approach despite solid residential sales, said chairmen Lee Ka-kit and Lee Ka-shing in a statement.

The company hence cut its final dividend to HK$0.76 per share from HK$1.30 previously, even as Hong Kong’s residential market showed signs of improvement in the second half of the year.

Henderson said profit attributable to equity shareholders fell 10 per cent in 2025 to HK$5.65 billion (US$721.6 million) after taking fair losses into account. Underlying profit dropped a steeper 38 per cent to HK$6.06 billion, largely because the previous year included large gains from land resumptions and asset disposals.

The Hong Kong residential market recovery helped lift Henderson’s development revenue in Hong Kong by 23 per cent to HK$15.2 billion, driven by launches such as the Mid-Levels project The Legacy and several luxury developments along the former Kai Tak runway.
summary_zh: 香港恒隆地產因伊朗局勢及內地經濟前景不明朗而削減股息，儘管住宅銷售表現穩健，惟商業物業市場疲弱。

headline: Drivers in China rush to fill petrol tanks ahead of biggest price hike this year

China will raise refined oil prices at midnight, marking the...
full_text:
A steady stream of cars pulled into an ordinary petrol station in Beijing’s Chaoyang District early on Monday afternoon, keeping the pumps far busier than on a normal weekday as drivers rushed to refuel ahead of the year’s biggest price hike at midnight.

“I’m taking my lunch break to top up the tank quickly ahead of the price increase, as I fear long queues after work in the evening,” said Frank Jin, an office employee in Beijing.

China will raise refined oil prices at midnight, marking the fifth increase this year. Under the current pricing mechanism, domestic petrol and diesel prices would be increased by 2,205 yuan (US$320) and 2,120 yuan per tonne, respectively, according to a statement from the National Development and Reform Commission (NDRC) on Monday.

After a temporary control measure, actual domestic petrol and diesel prices would be increased by 1,160 yuan and 1,115 yuan per tonne, respectively, the statement said. The price control marks the first government intervention to mitigate the impact of rising international oil price since the current refined oil pricing mechanism was introduced in 2013.

Since the previous refined oil price adjustment in China on March 9, international crude prices have surged sharply due to escalating tensions in the Middle East, with regional oil prices hitting repeated record highs, according to the NDRC.

To cushion the impact of this abnormal rally and reduce burdens on downstream users, China would put in place temporary controls on domestic refined oil prices while keeping the existing pricing mechanism unchanged, the statement said.
summary_zh: 中國油價面臨年內最大漲幅，北京駕駛者趕在午夜前搶購汽油。

Global investors should take a fresh look at China, where rapid technological advancement is converging with declining geopolitical risk relative to other regions, senior investment executives said at the Milken Institute’s Global Investors’ Symposium on Monday.

The event in Hong Kong brought together 500 business leaders and senior executives from the investment, banking, finance, technology and consumer sectors under the theme “Capital in a Changing World”.

“I think we should seriously think about China, because of its stability [in this geopolitical turmoil], and I do see ‘animal spirits’ coming back,” said Hoi Tung, CEO and chairman of Ping An Overseas Holdings, the offshore investment arm of Ping An Insurance, China’s largest insurer by market capitalisation.

Tung said the firm was reassessing the level of US exposure in its US$60 billion portfolio, citing the Iran conflict as evidence that the US was “becoming less reliable” and “not really rules-based”, and adding that China could offer investment opportunities amid the volatility.

Aaron Costello, head of Asia at Cambridge Associates, a global investment firm, said he had seen a clear revival in investor interest in China’s technological advances after a prolonged lull following Covid-19.

“Last year on this stage, we were talking about how unloved China [was] and the scepticism that foreign investors had towards it,” Costello said.

Now, more clients were discussing whether to visit China to assess opportunities on the ground, he said, adding that sentiment had begun to thaw particularly among European investors while their US counterparts warmed more gradually.
summary_zh: 全球投資者在地緣政治動盪中重新看好中國的穩定性和科技進步，米爾肯論壇與會者呼籲投資者認真考慮中國投資機會。

headline: War-induced interest rate shocks unlikely to upset Asia’s property markets
excerpt:
Last week, the energy shock caused by the war in Iran showed signs of becoming a full-blown financial and economic crisis. The attacks on energy infrastructure across the Middle East, coupled with soaring prices of crucial refined petroleum products such as diesel and jet fuel, forced investors to start pricing in a prolonged disruption to supply and a contraction in demand.
Even if the Strait of Hormuz reopens sooner than anticipated, the scale of the damage to energy assets in the Persian Gulf
full_text:
Even if the Strait of Hormuz reopens sooner than anticipated, the scale of the damage to energy assets in the Persian Gulf means production and exports will take much longer to return to normal than previously assumed.

Rory Johnston, an oil analyst, said the effective closure of the strait had already caused a reduction in global oil supplies of 20 million barrels a day, far exceeding the predictions of 3 million a day at the time of Russia’s invasion of Ukraine in 2022, which proved too pessimistic. Faith Birol, the head of the International Energy Agency, recently said the Iran war was the “greatest global energy security threat in history”.

Bond investors fear the inflationary consequences of the supply shock will force many leading central banks to raise interest rates, dashing expectations of further reductions in borrowing costs. In a sign of the abruptness of the shift in market sentiment, traders are assigning a 50 per cent probability to a US interest rate rise by October, compared with expectations of reductions before the war erupted.

In Asia, which is highly exposed to supply disruptions due to heavy reliance on energy imports from the Gulf, the move towards tighter monetary policy is more advanced. Last week, the Reserve Bank of Australia (RBA) increased interest rates for the second straight month, joining the Bank of Japan in the region’s monetary tightening camp.

On March 18, Citigroup said it expected the Bank of Korea (BOK) to increase borrowing costs by half a percentage point this year because of the more “pronounced impact” of higher oil prices on inflation.
summary_zh: 伊朗戰爭引發能源危機衝擊全球油價，但亞洲房地產市場受利率震盪影響有限。

headline: Regal’s US$194 million hotel sale highlights investor push into Hong Kong student housing
excerpt:
Regal Hotels International Holdings and its units have sold the 494-room Regal Kowloon Hotel for about HK$1.52 billion (US$194 million) to the real estate investment arm of Centaline Group, which operates one of Hong Kong’s largest property agency networks, to be converted into a student hostel.
Regal Hotels and affiliates Century City International Holdings and Paliburg Holdings agreed to dispose of the 17-storey hotel on Sa Po Road, including two basement floors, the group said in a filing...
full_text:
Regal Hotels and affiliates Century City International Holdings and Paliburg Holdings agreed to dispose of the 17-storey hotel on Sa Po Road, including two basement floors, the group said in a filing with the Hong Kong stock exchange on Monday.

The buyer was identified as Blue Sky Properties, a Hong Kong-based unit of Centaline Strategic Investments.

The purchase amount was about 7.8 per cent lower than the appraised value of HK$1.65 billion at the end of 2025. The sale also included HK$753 million of debt tied to the asset, which would be assumed by the buyer, the filing said.

The property would be rebranded under Centaline’s student accommodation platform CampusOne Communities, the company said in a separate statement.

full_text:
The acquisition boosts Zijin’s reserves amid resource nationalism, giving it control of Chifeng’s assets in Asia and Africa

2 -MIN READ2 -MIN

Published: 2:17pm, 23 Mar 2026Updated: 6:52pm, 23 Mar 2026

Zijin Mining, China’s largest gold producer, has expanded its buying spree by acquiring controlling shares in China-based Chifeng Jilong Gold Mining for 18.26 billion yuan (US$2.64 billion), the company said.

The acquisition came only two months after Zijin Mining proposed to buy Canadian Allied Gold for 28 billion yuan as part of its global expansion.

Through its subsidiary Zijin Gold, the acquisition was structured in two primary tranches, Zijin Mining said in a Hong Kong stock exchange filing on Monday. Zijin will purchase 242 million A shares from Li Jinyang, the controlling shareholder of Chifeng Gold, and affiliate Zhejiang Hanfeng Venture Capital at 41.36 yuan per share, representing a 1.3 per cent premium over the last closing price. Li was the spouse of Chifeng’s late founder, Zhao Meiguang.

Advertisement

Zijin has agreed to subscribe to 311 million newly issued H shares of Chifeng Gold at HK$30.19 per share. Upon completion, Zijin Mining’s total stake will rise to 25.85 per cent, granting it effective control and allowing full financial consolidation of the company.

Shares of Zijin Mining lost nearly 5 per cent to HK$32.52 while Chifeng Gold slumped 25 per cent to HK$31.52 on Monday in Hong Kong.

Advertisement

Zijin said the acquisition would significantly strengthen its reserves as resource nationalism and geopolitical friction had made overseas deals more difficult. According to the exchange filing, Chifeng Gold operated six gold mines and one polymetallic mine across mainland China, Southeast Asia and West Africa, with reserves of 583 tonnes of gold, 590,000 tonnes of copper, and 60,000 tonnes of rare earth at the end of 2025.

headline: Global markets brace for rate hikes as prolonged Iran war stokes tightening fears
excerpt:
Expectations of monetary tightening by global central banks have intensified, triggering a fresh wave of sell-offs in risk assets as the US-Israel war with Iran enters its fourth week.
Rates traders are now projecting no rate cuts by the Federal Reserve this year after chair Jerome Powell said last week that rising oil prices added uncertainty to the monetary outlook. That stands in contrast to the forecast of two reductions before the outbreak of the hostilities in the Middle East.
The European
full_text:
Expectations of monetary tightening by global central banks have intensified, triggering a fresh wave of sell-offs in risk assets as the US-Israel war with Iran enters its fourth week.

Rates traders are now projecting no rate cuts by the Federal Reserve this year after chair Jerome Powell said last week that rising oil prices added uncertainty to the monetary outlook. That stands in contrast to the forecast of two reductions before the outbreak of the hostilities in the Middle East.

The European Central Bank (ECB) has become more hawkish, reverting to wording that analysts say often precedes interest-rate increases. In Asia, Bank of America dropped its prediction of rate cuts in China this year and ING predicted that South Korea might raise borrowing costs as early as May after nominating a more hawkish central bank governor.

Australia boosted its interest rate by 25 basis points last week to reflect higher energy costs.

The jitters reverberated across markets in Asia on Monday, with stocks tumbling and bond yields edging higher. Even gold, the traditional haven for market turmoil, cratered with a more than 8 per cent decline, as a higher interest-rate environment is set to reduce the appeal of the non-yielding metal.

Tighter financial conditions would be a setback for global equities, which had traded at elevated levels before the oil shock on optimism that the multiples could be underpinned by monetary easing by central banks.
summary_zh: 全球市場因伊朗戰爭延長而擔憂央行加息，美聯儲暗示取消今年減息計畫。

headline: Trump tells CNBC 'we are very intent on making a deal' with Iran
excerpt: U.S. President Donald Trump on Monday said he would order the military to postpone strikes on Iran's power plants and energy infrastructure for five days.
full_text:
President Donald Trump on Monday said he would order the U.S. military to postpone strikes on Iran's power plants and energy infrastructure for five days following talks with Tehran's authorities.

He told CNBC's Joe Kernen in a phone call shortly after the post that "we are very intent on making a deal with Iran."

However, Iranian state media, citing an unnamed "senior security official" in a post on Telegram countered Trump's description of conversations, saying direct or indirect talks have not taken place between Washington and Tehran.

"There is been no negotiation and there is no negotiation, and with this kind of psychological warfare, neither the Strait of Hormuz will return to its pre-war conditions nor will there be peace in the energy markets," state media reported the official as saying.

Trump said earlier in a post on his Truth Social platform that the U.S. and Iran had "VERY GOOD AND PRODUCTIVE CONVERSATIONS REGARDING A COMPLETE AND TOTAL RESOLUTION OF OUR HOSTILITIES IN THE MIDDLE EAST."

The U.S. president said these talks would continue through the week. It was not immediately clear who participated in the talks or when they where they were held.

U.S. stock futures rallied, the dollar fell against other major currencies and oil prices tumbled on the news.

Speaking with Kernen, Trump said discussions with Iranian authorities had been very intense and that he remains hopeful something very substantive can be achieved.

The U.S. president also insisted on the same call that what is unfolding in Iran can be described as regime change, Kernen reported.
summary_zh: 特朗普表示美國有意與伊朗達成協議，宣佈暫停對伊朗電力設施的軍事打擊五天；伊朗官方否認雙方進行過談判。

headline: Oil tumbles after Trump postpones U.S. strikes against Iran energy infrastructure for five days
excerpt: Fears over a prolonged disruption in the Strait of Hormuz have kept investors on edge as oil prices swung in volatile trading Monday.
full_text:
Oil prices tumbled Monday after President Donald Trump said the U.S. and Iran had productive talks, leading him to order a halt on strikes against key energy infrastructure in the country.

Brent crude fell more than 6% to $105.09 per barrel after topping $112 on Friday. West Texas Intermediate futures dropped nearly 6% to $92.29 per barrel.

"I AM PLEASE TO REPORT THAT THE UNITED STATES OF AMERICA, AND THE COUNTRY OF IRAN, HAVE HAD, OVER THE LAST TWO DAYS, VERY GOOD AND PRODUCTIVE CONVERSATIONS REGARDING A COMPLETE AND TOTAL RESOLUTION OF OUR HOSTILITIES IN THE MIDDLE EAST," Trump said in a Truth Social post.

"I HAVE INSTRUCTED THE DEPARTMENT OF WAR TO POSTPONE ANY AND ALL MILITARY STRIKES AGAINST IRANIAN POWER PLANTS AND ENERGY INFRASTRUCTURE FOR A FIVE DAY PERIOD," Trump wrote.

The post comes after Trump gave Iran 48 hours to reopen the Strait of Hormuz. To be sure, it's still not clear when the key shipping route will reopen.

Goldman Sachs sharply raised its oil price forecasts on Monday, expecting Brent to average $110 in March and April, up from a previously forecast of $98, or a 62% jump from the 2025 annual average. The bank also upgraded its WTI estimates to $98 in March and $105 in April.

"Assuming that Hormuz flows remain at 5% [of normal flows] through April 10, prices are likely to trend higher over that period," Goldman analysts said, adding that governments' recognition of the risks surrounding concentrated supply and limited spare domestic capacity could further lead to greater stockpiling and long-dated prices.

Should Hormuz flows remain at 5% for 10 weeks, daily Brent prices will likely exceed their 2008 record level, Goldman said. Brent crude hit about $147 per barrel in July 2008 before collapsing to around $40 within months as the global financial crisis crushed demand.

The Strait of Hormuz normally handles roughly 20% of global oil supplies.

Iranian state media on Sunday insisted that Tehran would allow safe passage through the strait for all shipping except vessels linked to "Iran's enemies."

Fatih Birol, the executive director of the International Energy Agency, warned Monday that the situation in the Middle East is "very severe" and far worse than the two oil shocks in the 1970s, as well as the impact of the Russia-Ukraine war on gas, put together.

IEA member nations on March 11 agreed to release a record 400 million barrels of oil from strategic stockpiles to address the supply disruption triggered by the Iran war.

The IEA chief said he had been consulting with governments in Asia and Europe on releasing more stockpiled oil "if necessary," while stressing that the most important solution would be "opening the Hormuz Strait."
summary_zh: 特朗普宣佈暫停對伊朗能源設施的軍事打擊五天，聲稱美伊進行了建設性談判，導致油價大幅下跌。

headline: European stocks stage rebound as Trump signals Iran war de-escalation
excerpt: European stocks are rebounding sharply after President Donald Trump hinted at a de-escalation of tensions in a TruthSocial post.
full_text:
LONDON — European stocks rebounded sharply on Monday after U.S. President Donald Trump signaled a potential dramatic de-escalation in the ongoing Iran conflict.

The pan-European Stoxx 600 rose 1.2% just after 11:10 a.m. in London (7:10 a.m. ET), having traded almost 2% lower earlier in the session, with major bourses and most sectors surging into positive territory.

President Trump said he was postponing strikes on Iranian energy infrastructure for five days. The president wrote in a TruthSocial post that U.S. and Iranian officials had held "very good and productive" talks regarding a "complete and total resolution" of hostilities.

Travel and leisure stocks led the way in Europe, advancing 2.6% after Trump's post, while basic resources, which had tumbled 3.1% in morning trade, was last seen up 1.3%.

Precious metals eased earlier losses. Spot gold was down 2.1% on Monday at $4394.36, with gold futures 3.2% lower, at $4426.90.

The swings followed a sell-off in Asian markets on Monday, amid continued concerns over the Iran war and the blockage of vital maritime passage, the Strait of Hormuz.

U.S. President Donald Trump said Saturday that he would "obliterate" Iran's power plants if Tehran failed to fully reopen the Strait within 48 hours.

Iran responded by escalating threats to target energy infrastructure and desalination facilities in the Gulf. Iranian Parliament speaker Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf also said Saturday that entities that purchase American government bonds and "finance the U.S. military budget" would be considered legitimate targets, alongside military bases.

In corporate news, Poste Italiane tumbled 7.3% in early dealmaking after Italy's majority state-owned postal service unveiled plans to buy Telecom Italia in a cash-and-share deal worth 10.8 billion euros ($12.5 billion). Poste Italiane is Telecom Italia's largest shareholder. Telecom Italia's shares rose 3.9%.

Delivery Hero advanced 2.4% in early dealmaking after it said it had agreed to sell its delivery platform in Taiwan to Grab Holdings for $600 million.

Crude prices whipsawed in volatile trading earlier Monday, with global benchmark Brent rising 1.3% to $113.70, while Asia-Pacific markets traded lower. U.S. stock futures edged lower on Monday with sentiment knocked after the major U.S. benchmarks posted their fourth-straight weekly loss.

Earnings reports in Europe come from Kongsberg Gruppen, Exor and Galp Energia . Spain trade balance data will also be released.

— CNBC's Anniek Bao contributed to this market report.
summary_zh: 特朗普暗示美伊衝突緩和，歐洲股市應聲反彈。

headline: Gold and silver losses ease as Trump postpones Iran energy strikes
excerpt: Precious metals recovered some of Monday morning's heavy losses after President Trump delayed strikes against Iran's energy facilities.
full_text:
Gold, silver and platinum resumed their recent sell-off on Monday, but recovered strongly from initial sharp losses as fresh hopes of a de-escalation of the Iranian conflict buoyed investors.

The price of spot gold had fallen more than 5% on Monday morning, at $4,262.50, before recovering to trade at $4,412 at 11:40 a.m. in London (7:40 a.m. ET).

The whipsawing followed an announcement by President Donald Trump that the U.S. would postpone its strikes on Iranian energy infrastructure after "good and productive" talks between the two nations.

Gold futures were last seen around 4% lower, at $4,392, having earlier dipped almost 10%.

The precious yellow metal lost almost 10% last week in its worst showing since September 2011. Spot gold has now lost around 25% since hitting a record high of $5,594.92/oz at the end of January.

Spot silver , meanwhile, was down 5.9% at $63.76, a year-to-date low and almost half of its $117 level on Feb. 28, when the Iran war began. While heavy selling seen earlier in the day eased slightly, silver futures were still trading 8.3% lower on Monday at $63.98.

The sell-off extended to other precious metals, with platinum futures plummeting 9.7% to $1,780.20, while palladium dropped 4.7% to $1,377.50.

The retreat from gold — which is traditionally seen as a key safe haven asset in times of market turmoil — chimes with the ongoing risk-off sentiment in markets as the Iran conflict fuels concerns over inflation and rising energy prices.

The prospect of higher interest rates as a result of the war could boost government bonds among investors, at the expense of non-yielding precious metals, market strategists told CNBC recently.

However, euro zone government bond yields were once again moving higher in early trading on Monday as the conflict's latest escalation left few hiding places for investors.

Earlier, after Trump had issued an ultimatum to Iran calling for the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz, and Iran threatened buyers of U.S. Treasury bonds, Nic Puckrin, co-founder of Coin Bureau, said this could end the long gold rally of the past year.

"The stakes in the Iran war just escalated and what we're seeing is the ultimate flight to safety. This is exactly how crowded momentum trades come to an end," Puckrin said.

"What we're seeing in precious metals signals that central banks and Gulf states are tapping into the gold reserves that they have built over the past couple of years. The focus has moved from accumulation to capital preservation. This will put a natural cap on gold prices."
summary_zh: 特朗普延遲對伊朗能源設施的軍事打擊，引發市場對局勢緩和的期望，貴金屬價格從早盤跌幅中反彈。

headline: More than 40 Middle East energy assets ‘severely damaged,’ IEA chief says
excerpt: The IEA’s Fatih Birol warned that damage to energy infrastructure across the Middle East would take some time to repair.
full_text:
The head of the International Energy Agency said on Monday that at least 40 energy assets across nine countries in the Middle East have been "severely or very severely" damaged since the Iran war began, raising fears of prolonged supply disruptions.

Speaking at the National Press Club in Australia's capital, IEA Executive Director Fatih Birol said damage to oil and gas fields, refineries and pipelines across the Middle East would take some time to repair.

His comments come as market participants closely monitor threats from the U.S. and Iran over energy facilities as the sprawling regional conflict enters its fourth week.

The Iran war has severely disrupted energy trade flows through the strategically vital Strait of Hormuz, creating what the IEA says is the largest supply disruption in the history of the global oil market. The global supply of liquefied natural gas (LNG) has also been reduced by roughly 20% since the conflict began on Feb. 28.

Birol said the fallout from the Iran war is equivalent to the two major oil crises of the 1970s and the 2022 gas crisis "put together."

He added: "And, if I may, not only oil and gas. Some of the vital arteries of the global economy, such as petrochemicals, such as fertilizers, such as sulfur, such as helium. Their trade is all interrupted, which would have serious consequences for the global economy."

U.S. President Donald Trump on Saturday threatened to "obliterate" Iran's power plants if Tehran did not fully reopen the Strait of Hormuz within 48 hours.

The narrow waterway is a key maritime corridor that connects the Persian Gulf and the Gulf of Oman. Roughly 20% of global oil and gas typically passes through it.

Iran's Parliament spokesperson Mohammad Baqer Qalibaf responded, saying that critical infrastructure and energy facilities in the Gulf region could be "irreversibly destroyed" should Iranian power plants be attacked.

Given that shipping has virtually ground to a halt in the Strait of Hormuz since the conflict began, the IEA's Birol said the reopening of the waterway was the "single most important" solution to the global energy crisis.

He singled out Asia as being at the forefront of the Iran war energy shock and said the IEA was prepared to follow-up its historic release of 400 million barrels of oil to the market on March 11.

"If it is necessary, of course, we will do it," Birol said.

— CNBC's Anniek Bao contributed to this report.
summary_zh: 國際能源署署長警告中東地區超過40處能源設施遭嚴重破壞，伊朗戰爭引發能源供應中斷風險。

headline: Danone to buy protein shake maker Huel as health nutrition craze drives demand shift
excerpt: Merging the companies is an opportunity in fast-growing nutrition space, said Danone CEO  Antoine de Saint-Affrique.
full_text:
French food and beverage maker Danone said Monday it's set to buy protein drinks maker Huel as a more health-conscious younger generation and the rise of weight-loss drugs pushes companies to rethink what people want to consume.

Huel sells a range of protein shakes and drinks fortified with nutrients. It's backed by celebrities such as The Diary of a CEO podcast host Steven Bartlett and actor Idris Elba.

Combining Huel's range and digital capabilities with Danone's global reach and nutritional expertise is an opportunity in "the new and fast-growing nutritionally complete space," said Danone CEO Antoine de Saint-Affrique in a statement.

"Most people don't get enough protein, fibre, or the right nutrients," added Huel CEO James McMaster. "That's the problem Huel exists to solve."

The deal, which is subject to regulatory approvals, is about 1 billion euros ($1.15 billion), the Financial Times reported, citing a person close to the company. Danone declined to comment on the value of the transaction.

Danone CEO De Saint-Affrique told CNBC's Charlotte Reed in 2024 that its portfolio, which includes yoghurts and water, was "extremely complementary" to growing health awareness and the use of GLP-1 drugs. Danone also makes specialized nutrition and baby milk, with key brands such as Activia yoghurts, Alpro plant-based milk and infant formula Aptamil.

Food makers are already starting to adapt to emerging trends through portion control, tweaking recipes and offering more premium products, which is only likely to accelerate as adoption of GLP-1s rises, according to analysts at ING.

The impact of these drugs is still limited in Europe, with around 2% of the adult population currently using them, ING said in a note to clients on Friday, "but that number will grow."

"Food makers face a gradual demand shift, giving them time to respond by changing products and marketing and investing in markets with less GLP-1 use."

Estimates vary on the size of the future global market for GLP-1 drugs, with ING expecting the market to reach $100 billion in 2027.
summary_zh: 丹尼斯集團收購蛋白質飲品製造商Huel，以應對健康營養需求增長及消費者健康意識提升的趨勢轉變。

headline: Iran threatens U.S. Treasury buyers as Trump’s 48-hour ultimatum looms
excerpt: Iran widened its warnings to target buyers of U.S. Treasury bonds, the latest salvo in an intensifying exchange of threats as the war entered its fourth week.
full_text:
As the war in the Middle East entered its fourth week, Iran has widened its warnings to target buyers of U.S. Treasury bonds, the latest salvo in an intensifying exchange of threats, as the Trump administration's 48-hour ultimatum neared expiry.

In a social media post on Sunday, Iran's Parliament speaker Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf said that U.S.-linked financial institutions holding American government bonds would be targeted alongside military bases.

"U.S. treasury bonds are soaked in Iranians' blood. Purchase them, and you purchase a strike on your HQ and assets," Ghalibaf said. "Alongside military bases, those financial entities that finance the U.S. military budget are legitimate targets," he added in the post.

The escalating warning came after U.S. President Donald Trump issued a 48-hour ultimatum to Tehran on Saturday to reopen the Strait of Hormuz — a key artery for global energy shipping — or face strikes on its power plants. The deadline is set to expire on Monday evening in Washington.

Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu vowed to back the U.S. threat: "Whatever we do, we do together, and as far as possible, in confidence."

Speaking at the site of an Iranian missile attack in the southern city of Arad on Sunday, Netanyahu called on world leaders to join the war efforts, including the European nations. "They have the capacity to reach deep into Europe ... they are putting everyone in their sights."

Iran has pushed back, threatening to completely shut the waterway and attack energy infrastructure and desalination facilities in the Gulf if the U.S. follows through on its ultimatum.

Ghalibaf warned on Sunday that any U.S. or Israeli strike on Iran's power plants would "immediately" trigger retaliatory attacks on energy and oil infrastructure across the region, causing "irreversible" damage.

"Critical infrastructure and energy and oil infrastructure throughout the region will be considered legitimate targets and irreversibly destroyed, and oil prices will rise for a long time," Ghalibaf said on X.

Military hostilities continued to intensify over the weekend, with reports suggesting that Israel has been experiencing intense missile activity, triggering multiple alerts for people to take shelter in the Jerusalem and central Israel areas. At least eight locations, mainly across central Israel, have been hit by falling debris or explosives, according to Al Jazeera.

On Monday, the Israeli military said that it had begun a wide-scale wave of strikes targeting Iranian infrastructure in Tehran, with reports of explosions in several parts of the capital early Monday morning.

Iran has continued to fire missiles and drones at Israel and Gulf countries hosting U.S. assets. Kuwait and the United Arab Emirates said Monday that their air defenses have intercepted more hostile missile and drone attacks from Iran, with air raid sirens sounding in Bahrain.

Separately, Saudi Arabia's defence ministry said it had detected two ballistic missiles fired towards the Riyadh area. One was intercepted, and the other fell into an uninhabited area, a ministry spokesperson said.

Israeli and U.S. strikes have killed at least 1,500 people in Iran ​so far, according to the Iranian health ministry. But the U.S.-based rights group HRANA, which tracks human rights violations in Iran, recorded 3,320 people killed, including 1,406 civilians and 1,167 ​military personnel.

Iran has effectively closed the Strait of Hormuz to most shipping traffic since the U.S.-Israel launched strikes on the country on Feb. 28. The escalating Mideast conflict has sent oil prices soaring in recent weeks amid fears of a deepening oil supply shock, fueling inflationary worries and weighing on growth.

Crude prices whipsawed in volatile trading on Monday. Brent crude reversed earlier losses to gain 0.44% to $112.68 per barrel as of 10:57 p.m. EST. The U.S. West Texas Intermediate was up 0.78% at $99 per barrel.

Tehran would rather fight a protracted, drawn-out war with the U.S. than face repeated conflicts with Israel, said Nate Swanson, director of the Iran Strategy Project at the Atlantic Council.

"They don't need to fight a symmetrical war. They just need to survive," Swanson said of Iran, whereas the U.S. has to decimate the regime to fully achieve its objectives, he told CNBC's Squawk Box Asia on Monday.

"Survival is winning for Iran," he said. "They just need to hit one tanker every so often going through the Strait — they effectively have the bottleneck, even if it's not fully mined."
summary_zh: 伊朗擴大威脅範圍至美國國債購買者，聲言將予以打擊；特朗普政府48小時最後通牒即將期滿，中東衝突局勢持續升級。

headline: Sen. Warren questions DOD about Anthropic blacklist that 'appears to be retaliation'
excerpt: Warren sent letters to Pete Hegseth and Sam Altman, asking for additional details of OpenAI's contract with the defense department and Anthropic's blacklisting.
full_text:
Sen. Elizabeth Warren, D-Mass., said the Department of Defense's decision to designate artificial intelligence startup Anthropic a supply chain risk "appears to be retaliation."

In a formal letter to U.S. Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth on Monday, Warren noted that the department "could have chosen to terminate its contract with Anthropic or continued using its technology in unclassified systems."

"I am particularly concerned that the DoD is trying to strong-arm American companies into providing the Department with the tools to spy on American citizens and deploy fully autonomous weapons without adequate safeguards," Warren wrote.

U.S. senators are seeking more answers from the Defense Department's contracts with tech companies as the war in Iran continues, with the conflict entering a fourth week.

In the days leading up to the war, the DOD and Anthropic clashed as the department sought unfettered access to its models for all "lawful purposes," while Anthropic wanted assurance that its models would not be used for fully autonomous weapons or domestic "mass surveillance."

On Feb. 27, Hegseth posted that he was directing the DOD to apply the "supply chain risk" label on the company. The official notice came a week later as the department continued to use Anthropic's Claude model in Iran.

Anthropic filed a lawsuit against the Trump administration after the company was blacklisted and deemed a threat to U.S. national security. A preliminary hearing for the suit is scheduled for Tuesday in the U.S. District Court of the Northern District of California.

Hours after Anthropic was blacklisted, OpenAI came into the picture, announcing a deal with the DOD.

The company said it was confident the DOD would not use its AI systems for mass surveillance or fully autonomous weapons because of OpenAI's "safety stack," existing laws, and the contract language, which has not been shared in full.

However, neither Altman nor the defense department has been able to assuage the concerns of lawmakers, the public and some of the companies' employees.

Warren is also seeking answers from OpenAI CEO Sam Altman.

In a letter Monday, Warren asked Altman for information about the terms of its DOD agreement

"I am concerned that the terms of this agreement may permit the Trump Administration to use OpenAI's technology to conduct mass surveillance of Americans and build lethal autonomous weapons that could harm civilians with little to no human oversight," the letter states.

Last week, Altman met with a handful of lawmakers in Washington, D.C., where Sen. Mark Kelly, D-Ariz., raised "serious questions" about the company's approach to warfare and its DOD contract.

"Ultimately, it is impossible to assess any safeguards and prohibitions that may exist in OpenAI's agreement with DoD without seeing the full contract, which neither DoD nor OpenAI have made available," Warren wrote.

She added that what has been made public raises significant concerns about the DOD's use of AI.

Despite calls for answers, Democrats in the Senate have limited ability to force action, as Republicans control the White House and both houses of Congress.
summary_zh: 美國參議員沃倫質疑國防部將人工智能公司Anthropic列入黑名單，認為此舉似乎是報復行為，並要求國防部長解釋相關決定。

headline: India is launching cheap, weight-loss drugs and Novo Nordisk is betting on its brands to stay on top
excerpt: Indian generic drugmakers launch a price war against Novo Nordisk’s GLP-1 brands, Ozempic and WeGovy.
full_text:
Nurphoto | Nurphoto | Getty Images

The first wave of generic versions of Novo Nordisk's GLP-1 weight-loss drugs launched in India over the weekend, with at least five domestic drugmakers undercutting the original price by up to 80%. It comes as the Danish drugmaker's patent expired on Friday, with the company fighting to maintain its lead in the lucrative market.

India is a critical market, with around 100 million people living with diabetes and nearly a quarter classified as obese. The country is also known as "the world's pharmacy" with its well-developed generic drugs industry supplying around 20% of global off‑patent medicines.

Sun Pharmaceutical , one of the top generics manufacturers in the world, on Saturday launched a generic semaglutide for as low as 750 rupees ($8) for a weekly injection, or about 3,400 rupees per month. That compares with Novo's retail price of between 8,800 and 10,000 rupees in India, depending on the dosage.

Meanwhile, export-focused Dr. Reddy's Laboratories has so far launched semaglutide for treating diabetes at around 4,200 rupees per month and plans to expand to Canada, Turkey and Brazil this year.

The company's goal is to democratize access to GLP-1 drugs worldwide, said Deepak Sapra, CEO of Pharmaceutical Services and API at Dr. Reddy's, at a virtual launch event on Saturday. It's targeting annual sales of 12 million semaglutide pens in the first year of launch across all markets, including India.

"This is something that Indian generic players have been preparing for a very long time," Salil Kallianpur, an independent pharma consultant based in India, told CNBC.

More than 50 brands are expected to launch generic versions of semaglutide in the coming months. That's a small number by Indian standards, because of the relative complexity of making such drugs with their more stringent quality controls, Kallianpur said.

A price war

Even as semaglutide remains protected from generic competition in the U.S. – its largest market by far– until 2032, patent expirations in India, Canada, Brazil, and China this year are likely to have a sizable impact on its revenue. In February, Novo warned that sales could decline by 5% to 13% in 2026.

Novo is already facing declining market share amid fierce competition from Eli Lilly and other drugmakers. U.S. President Donald Trump has also pushed for lower drug prices, and a November deal with the administration slashed GLP-1 prices in the country. It is unclear whether higher sales volumes will offset the lower prices.

In December last year, Novo reduced the price of Wegovy by 37% from its launch price in India, before its patent expired, Reuters reported.

Analysts told CNBC that Novo needs to cut prices in India to defend its market share. Vishal Manchanda, a pharma sector analyst at Systematix Group, said that Novo could retain a large share of the market if it maintains a 15%–20% premium over generic versions.

Generic entries will affect Novo's sales in India, but it's not yet clear whether the Danish drugmaker will lose its leading position, said Sydbank analyst Søren Løntoft Hansen.

Novo has historically maintained a leading market share despite losing patent protection. The company has been a leading producer of insulin since its inception a century ago, and it has continued to dominate the market while still selling at a premium to generic rivals. Generic manufacturers have struggled to scale up production to challenge Novo's dominance, Hansen said.

watch now

Novo is confident in its ability to retain users in India. "Our size, technology, and complete care ecosystem justify the price we are getting after a 37% reduction," Vikrant Shrotriya, managing director of Novo Nordisk India, told CNBC's "Inside India" on Friday.

Even though Novo launched popular obesity drug Wegovy and diabetes treatment drug Ozempic in India after Lilly launched its rival Mounjaro and Zepbound, it "converted a mistake into an opportunity," as it came in at a much lower price and is now launching second brands, Kallianpur said.

Wegovy is being launched as Poviztra through a partnership with Emcure Pharma, while Ozempic is being marketed as Extensior in collaboration with Abbott India. These partners bring deep ties to pharmacies and physicians across the country, improving the drugmaker's reach.

It's a classic strategy for protecting a premium brand against cheaper generics, Kallianpur said, adding that Novo is banking heavily on its reputation. "The brand is essentially the moat."

The growing Indian market

Michael Siluk | UCG | Universal Images Group | Getty Images

While Sun Pharma and Dr. Reddy's launched semaglutide at about 50% below Novo's original prices, smaller domestic-focused manufacturers such as Natco Pharma and Alkem Laboratories are offering steeper discounts of nearly 80%.

summary_zh: 印度仿製藥廠商推出減肥藥物，價格遠低於諾和諾德的原廠藥，挑戰其市場領導地位。

headline: 'This is insane.' Long lines plague U.S. airports as TSA officers face second missed paycheck in shutdown
excerpt: The Trump administration said it plans to send ICE officers to help ease airport congestion amid TSA officer absences as they face second missed full paycheck.
full_text:
NEW YORK — Andrew Leonard showed up at John F. Kennedy International Airport at 4:45 a.m. on Monday for his 7 a.m. flight to Seattle. Nearly two hours later, he made it through security and to his gate just in time for boarding.

"I fly out of this terminal all the time and this is insane," said Leonard, a 34-year-old performing arts teacher in New York who was en route to Seattle ahead of a family vacation to Hawaii.

He is one of tens of thousands of travelers around the U.S. who are facing extra-long security wait times at major airport hubs such as Atlanta, New York and Houston due to elevated absences of Transportation Security Administration officers. TSA workers are facing a second missed full paycheck this week as a partial government shutdown continues.

White House border czar Tom Homan said Sunday said the administration would deploy Immigration and Customs Enforcement agents to airports on Monday to help ease security lines amid the Department of Homeland Security shutdown.

ICE agents weren't visible at checkpoints at Kennedy airport's Terminal 8 early Monday, and it wasn't clear where or when agents would be deployed. DHS and TSA didn't immediately respond to a request for comment early Monday.

Homan told CNN's "State of the Union" on Sunday that the ICE agents will be "helping TSA move those lines along," including by guarding exit doors to relieve TSA agents so they could screen travelers. "We're simply there to help TSA do their jobs in areas that don't need their specialized expertise."

TSA's more than 50,000 officers have been working without their regular paychecks since the partial government shutdown began in mid-February. The shutdown comes as Democrats in Congress demand changes to how federal immigration enforcement operates in exchange for releasing DHS funding after two U.S. citizens were shot and killed by officers in Minneapolis.

Hundreds of TSA officers have quit since the shutdown started, according to their union, the American Federation of Government Employees.

Members of the travel industry, including airline executives, have blasted lawmakers for failing to pay essential government workers during repeated shutdowns that have snarled travel.

In early 2019 and in late 2025, two federal government shutdowns ended shortly after travel disruptions escalated following higher-than-typical absences of air traffic controllers. Their pay isn't affected by this impasse.

New York's LaGuardia Airport was closed on Monday morning following a collision of an Air Canada regional jet and an emergency vehicle on Sunday night. Some passengers told CNBC they had switched to fly out of Kennedy because of the disruptions.

The Federal Aviation Administration issued a ground stop at Newark Liberty International Airport in New Jersey on Monday morning after air traffic controllers evacuated the tower because of a burning smell coming from an elevator, adding to travel chaos around New York City.

— CNBC's Garrett Downs contributed to this article.
summary_zh: 美國政府停擺期間，美國運輸安全局(TSA)人員面臨第二次未領薪酬，導致全國多個主要機場出現異常長隊。

headline: CNBC Daily Open: clock ticks on Trump's Hormuz ultimatum
excerpt: Tensions between Trump and Tehran rise as the clock ticks on the U.S. President's Hormuz ultimatum.
full_text:
Hello, this is Leonie Kidd writing to you from London. Welcome to another edition of CNBC's Daily Open.

I don't know about you, but I have found that ultimatums rarely work. But President Donald Trump's decision to issues Tehran with a deadline (which runs until 19:55 eastern time tonight) to reopen the Strait of Hormuz could mark a turning point in the conflict. Good or bad.

The markets don't quite know what to make of it, with certain stocks markets selling off, while oil surged before turning negative.

U.S. President Donald Trump on Saturday delivered a stark ultimatum to Iran, threatening to "obliterate" Iran's power plants if Tehran does not fully reopen the Strait of Hormuz within 48 hours.

Iran responded by warning it would target U.S. infrastructure in the Gulf, including energy and desalination facilities, if Washington carried out its threat.

Iran's speaker of the Parliament also warned that financial entities supporting the U.S. military budget were legitimate targets, and that buyers of U.S. Treasury bonds were purchasing "a strike on your HQ and assets."

It makes for a confusing trading environment. Stocks in Japan and South Korea led declines in Asia, while futures in both Europe and the U.S. are quietly accelerating declines. Meanwhile, oil prices seesawed during the early part of Monday's trading session.

Later today, British Prime Minister Keir Starmer will chair an emergency meeting with Chancellor of the Exchequer Rachel Reeves and Bank of England Governor Andrew Bailey to discuss the economic fallout of the war in Iran. This follows a call between Starmer and Trump where they discussed the importance of reopening the Strait of Hormuz.

In other news, an Air Canada plane has collided with an airport fire rescue truck upon landing at New York's LaGuardia airport, with MSNow reporting that no details on passenger welfare have been released yet.

— Leonie Kidd

From satellites to space data centers: Why low earth orbit is attracting billions in investment

A new layer of critical infrastructure is emerging above our heads.

Low Earth Orbit (LEO) — which NASA defines as the stretch of space at an altitude of 2,000 km or less — is rapidly evolving from a niche technical domain into one of the most strategically important environments of the 21st century.

It underpins global navigation, telecommunications, defense and worldwide connectivity and is seeing a flood of investment.

— Tessa McCann
summary_zh: 特朗普向伊朗發出最後通牒，要求其重新開放荷莫茲海峽，引發中東局勢緊張升級。

headline: 李家超：本港匯聚逾3380間單一家族辦公室　較兩年前增25%
excerpt:
政府今晚舉行高峰晚宴，宴請約130位來自亞洲、歐洲、美洲、大洋洲和非洲的家族辦公室決策人及家族成員，為明日舉行的第4屆「裕澤香江」高峰論壇拉開帷幕。

行政長官李家超致歡迎辭時表示，縱使環球局勢瞬息萬變，香港始終堅穩不移，一如既往為資本、機構和家族提供穩固的根基。目前全港已匯聚超過3380間單一家族辦公室，較兩年前增長達25%，其中逾半數領導層已由第二代或以後的成員擔任，充分反映超高淨值家族對香港作為跨代傳承基地的堅定信心。

李家超說，對世界各地家辦決策人而言，香港具備條件令他們放心選擇在此傳承世代財富，包括在「一國兩制」下，香港是全球唯一匯聚中國優勢和國際優勢的世界級城市；體育、文化及藝術活動在香港一應俱全，藝術品倉儲亦將是世界級地標機場城市SKYTOPIA發展項目之一等。

晚宴由「人機共舞醒獅」帶動氣氛，傳統醒獅與靈活敏捷的機械狗動態神氣活現，傳統文化與前沿科技完美結合，體現香港兼容並蓄、推陳出新的城市精神，同時亦呼應本屆論壇聚焦人工智能與機械人技術等前沿議題的方向。

第4屆「裕澤香江」高峰論壇以「築就傳承」為主題，為與會者帶來嶄新角度去延續傳承財富，鞏固香港作為全球頂級家族
summary_zh: 李家超宣布香港單一家族辦公室數量達3380間，較兩年前增長25%，凸顯香港作為全球家族財富跨代傳承基地的優勢。

headline: 美國或推遲打擊伊朗能源設施　本港夜期上升　歐股及美期指轉強
excerpt:
美國總統特朗普表示，與伊朗對話富有成效，將命令推遲打擊當地發電站及能源設施5日。

消息帶動本港期指夜市時段顯著造好，較早時報24871點，升524點，升幅2.15%。

歐美股市亦轉強，倫敦富時指數靠穩。法蘭克福DAX指數較早時升約2%，巴黎CAC 40指數升逾1%。美股3大指數期貨較早時升約2%。

原油期貨價格顯著回落，金價跌幅收窄。



編輯：宋家樑
summary_zh: 美國總統特朗普宣布推遲打擊伊朗能源設施5天，受消息提振，香港期指夜市上升逾2%，歐美股市亦轉強。

headline: 恒地去年盈利減少約10%　末期息減少至0.76元
excerpt:
恒地去年盈利56.53億元，按年減少10.2%。基礎盈利60.63億元，按年減少38%，因去年度政府收回若干新界土地及出讓北角的投資物業。

集團表示，由於中東局勢為經濟帶來不明朗因素，減少派發末期息至每股0.76元，按年減少42%，連同中期股息合計的全年股息1.26元，按年少30%。

期內，收入按年增加約1.9%至257.4億元，當中物業發展上升17%至146.4億元，租金收入跌逾3%至近70億元。

至去年底，集團在新界持有約4050萬平方呎土地儲備，當中元朗區佔最多，約2410萬平方呎。

集團表示，環球經濟受地緣政治局勢及美國貿易政策搖擺不定困擾。而香港繼續吸引大量企業前來上市集資，反映作為國際金融中心的地位，而政府加速發展北部都會區等，本港經濟定將更添活力，本地樓市可望受惠。



編輯：李意琴
summary_zh: 恒地去年盈利56.53億元按年減少10.2%，末期息大幅減少至每股0.76元，全年股息總額按年下跌30%。

headline: 恒基發展去年虧損收窄至6700萬元
excerpt:
恒基發展去年虧損收窄逾46%至6700萬元。不派息。

公司去年收入逾14.5億元，按年跌逾5%。

集團表示，本港零售業經營環境仍相當困難，將繼續簡化運作流程，盡力控制各項經營開支，並繼續緊握市場脈搏，調整產品組合以迎合顧客不斷變化的喜好，加上會員基礎人數不斷擴大，可望能帶動整體業績改善。



編輯：宋家樑
summary_zh: 恒基發展去年虧損收窄至6700萬元，不派息；收入按年下跌逾5%至14.5億元。

headline: 恒指曾挫逾千點　收市跌894點　分析：短線或繼續尋底
excerpt:
中東局勢持續緊張，亞太區內股市顯著下挫，港股一度急跌逾1000點，創近一年最大跌幅。恒生指數收市跌894點，報24382點。內地3大指數跌3%以上。日韓台股市下挫超過2%至6%。

分析表示，恒指將繼續受外圍市況影響，短線或繼續尋底，24000點是重要支持。



編輯：宋家樑
summary_zh: 受中東局勢緊張影響，港股大幅下挫，恒指一度跌逾千點，收市跌894點；分析認為短線或繼續尋底，24000點為重要支持位。

headline: 北京亦莊人形機器人半程馬拉松　參賽隊伍數量按年升近5倍
excerpt:
第二屆北京亦莊人形機器人半程馬拉松和世界人形機器人運動會下月19日舉行，合共收到來自過百參賽隊伍的半馬賽事報名申請，匯聚26個品牌、300多台人形機器人。今屆參賽隊伍數量按年升近5倍，當中包括香港代表的隊伍。而作為人機共跑的賽事，報名選手逾3.2萬人，創了新高。

北京市經濟和信息化局副局長劉維亮表示，近年大模型和具身智能技術發展迅速，當局已強化政策與資金保障，設立總規模1000億元的政府投資基金，加大對於以人形機器人為代表的未來產業領域開展投資，積極引導社會資本投入。

劉維亮說，去年1月至今，北京23家人形機器人整機及零部件企業共獲得融資192.4億元，佔全國相關領域融資比重達41%。他相信，今年是人形機器人加快場景應用落地，以及推動實現量產的關鍵一年。

他又說，北京將重點在創新平臺建設、應用場景拓展、產業生態培育三個方面發力，包括建設公共研發平台以降低企業成本，建設大規模的具身智能資料訓練中心等；持續推動頭部企業更快速發展，重點吸引和培育核心零部件、專用晶片、先進材料等領域企業，推動優質企業更早登陸資本市場等。



編輯：譚佩貞
summary_zh: 第二屆北京亦莊人形機器人半程馬拉松下月舉行，參賽隊伍按年升近5倍至逾百隊，匯聚300多台機器人及逾3.2萬名選手參與人機共跑。北京當局投入1000億元政府基金扶持人形機器人產業發展，去年融資額達192.4億元佔全國四成。
keywords_zh: 世界人形機器人運動會

headline: 在岸人民幣兌美元收報6.9062　創兩星期最低
excerpt:
在岸人民幣收報6.9062兌1美元，創兩星期以來最低，較上星期五收市價跌245點子。

中東戰事帶動避險情緒升溫，美元指數接近100水平，人民幣跟隨其他亞洲貨幣受壓。



編輯：宋家樑
summary_zh: 在岸人民幣兌美元跌至6.9062，創兩周新低；受中東局勢及美元升值影響，人民幣承壓。

headline: 老鋪黃金去年多賺2.3倍　末期息大升88%至11.95元
excerpt:
老鋪黃金去年盈利48.7億元人民幣，按年升2.3倍。經調整盈利50.3億元，按年升約2.35倍。末期息每股11.95元，按年急升88%。

集團去年收入升2.2倍，達到273億元。



編輯：宋家樑
summary_zh: 老鋪黃金去年盈利大幅增長2.3倍至48.7億元人民幣，末期息飆升88%至每股11.95元。

headline: 中石化：中東局勢影響較預期要長　形勢不容樂觀
excerpt:
中石化副董事長趙東表示，在美以伊戰事爆發後，集團啟動應急預案，正密切關注中東局勢發展，集團3月對加工量稍為調整，但不影響市場供應，亦會按形勢發展為4月及5月作適當安排，強調要保障社會成品油供應，從目前原油庫存和成品油庫存來說，就近兩個月的供應並無問題。

趙東表示，中東局勢的影響較集團預期要長，形勢不容樂觀，霍爾木茲海峽中斷通航後，在灣區內部分資源未能出來，為原油供應帶來一定影響，運費及油價上升亦帶來不利影響，但中石化有從沙特取得資源，避開霍爾木茲海峽的輸送渠道，同時亦積極獲取非中東資源。由於中石化為全球最大貿易商，獲取資源時有更多手段，成本亦較低。

美國日前宣布為期30日豁免，允許交易目前在海上運輸的俄羅斯石油與汽油產品。趙東表示，有關資源相對有限。

他表示，集團有積極向國家相關部委爭取，包括動用社會責任儲備等政策，相信有關部委正密切跟蹤庫存情況，再動態出台政策。



編輯：宋家樑
summary_zh: 中石化副董事長趙東指中東局勢影響期限長於預期，形勢不容樂觀，但集團已啟動應急預案並採取措施確保國內成品油供應。

headline: 恒指大挫894點　金融股受壓
excerpt:
港股連跌3日，恒指午後跌幅一度擴大至1074點，低見24203點，收報24382點，跌894點，幅度3.54%，成交額近3687億元。

各主要分類指數跌逾2%至近半成，金融分類指數表現較差。

科技指數報4712點，跌3.3%。藍籌股只有中海油及吉利汽車上升，其餘下跌。金價及銀價下挫，老鋪黃金跌近9%，靈寶黃金更跌逾12%，中國白銀跌逾8%。紫金礦業收購赤峰黃金控股權，分別跌近半成及25%。

金融股顯著受壓，滙控、平保、中人壽、友邦跌逾4%至近8%。

美國加息預期升溫，對息口敏感的地產及收租股向下，恒地、新地、九倉置業跌近4%至5%以上。
summary_zh: 港股連跌第3日，恒指收跌894點至24382點，跌幅3.54%，金融股受美息預期升溫影響而顯著受壓。

headline: 發改委對成品油價採取調控措施　加幅較現行價格機制計算降低近半
excerpt:
發改委公布，今晚午夜起國內汽油、柴油價格每噸分別上調1160元及1115元人民幣。發改委指出，根據現行價格機制計算，汽油及柴油價格每噸應分別上調2205元及2120元，經臨時調控後實際上調1160元及1115元。

發改委指，自3月9日國內成品油價格調整以來，受美以伊衝突加劇影響，國際市場原油價格大幅上升。為減緩國際油價異常上升帶來的衝擊，減輕下游用戶負擔，在保持現行價格機制框架基礎上，對國內成品油價格採取臨時調控措施。

新華社報道，近年來成品油價格一直按現行機制調整，今次是2013年現行機制實施以來首次調控。相關專家分析，臨時調控是應對國際油價大幅上漲採取的及時有力措施，對保障國內經濟平穩運行具有重要作用。



編輯：宋家樑
summary_zh: 發改委對成品油價格採取臨時調控措施，將汽油、柴油漲幅降低近半，以應對國際油價異常上升對國內經濟的衝擊。

headline: 金價失守4200美元　自紀錄高位回吐逾20%
excerpt:
貴金屬價格急跌。

現貨金失守每盎司4200美元，較早時報每盎司4130美元左右。若以今年1月高位每盎司約5595美元計，累計跌逾20%。

現貨銀價一度失守每盎司61美元，較早時在62美元附近，較今年高位跌約一半。



編輯：宋家樑
summary_zh: 現貨金價失守4200美元關口，較今年高位5595美元累計回吐逾20%；現貨銀價亦大幅下跌至61美元附近，跌幅約五成。

headline: 內地3大指數挫逾3%或以上收市
excerpt:
內地股市午後跌勢加劇。銀行、貴金屬及旅遊股受壓；煤炭開採、油氣股逆市上升。

上證指數一度失守3800點，低見3794點，跌逾4%，收市報3813點，創逾半年以來最低，跌143點，幅度3.63%。

深證成份指數報13345點，跌520點，跌幅3.76%。

創業板指數報3235點，跌116點，跌幅3.49%。



編輯：宋家樑
summary_zh: 內地股市午後跌勢加劇，滬深京三大指數挫逾3%收市，上證指數創逾半年新低。

headline: 韓股急跌逾6%　韓元跌至逾17年低位
excerpt:
韓國股市下挫逾6%。

首爾綜合指數收報5405點，跌375點，跌幅6.49%。

另外，韓元兌美元跌至1517.3韓元，是2009年3月9日以來最弱水平。



編輯：宋家樑
summary_zh: 韓國股市急跌逾6%，首爾綜合指數跌幅創近期新低，同時韓元對美元匯率跌至17年來最弱水平。

headline: 日股收市跌1857點
excerpt:
東京股市顯著下挫，連跌兩日。

日經指數一度跌至50688點，跌近2700點，收報51515點，是約兩個半月以來最低，跌1857點，幅度3.5%。



編輯：宋家樑
summary_zh: 日股顯著下挫，日經指數收報51515點，跌1857點，創兩個半月新低。

headline: 台股低收逾2%
excerpt:
台灣股市跌逾2%，加權指數收市報32722點，跌821點，跌幅2.45%。



編輯：李意琴
summary_zh: 台灣股市今日大幅下跌逾2%，加權指數收跌821點至32722點。

headline: 恒指跌幅擴大至逾900點　現貨金跌近4%
excerpt:
中東局勢持續影響金融市場。

恒指下午跌幅擴大至逾900點，較早時報24359點，跌918點，跌幅3.63%。

內地3大指數跌3%或以上。日韓台股市跌逾2%至6%以上。

現貨金跌近4%，較早時報每盎司4321.5美元，英美期油變動不大。



編輯：勞家樂
summary_zh: 受中東局勢影響，香港恒生指數下午跌幅擴大至逾900點，現貨金價下跌近4%，亞洲股市普遍下挫。

headline: 華潤啤酒去年少賺29%　末期息增至0.557元人民幣
excerpt:
華潤啤酒去年盈利33.7億元人民幣，按年跌29%。派末期息每股0.557元人民幣，按年升44%，連同中期息0.464元，全年派息1.021元，上升逾34%，是過去5年新高。

期內，營業額近380億元，按年跌近2%。毛利率上升0.5個百分點至43.1%。

期內，啤酒業務營業額近365億元，銷量升約1.4%，次高及以上啤酒銷量按年有中至高單位數增長，佔整體銷量接近25%。白酒業務營業額近15億元。

集團表示，將進一步鞏固啤酒主業，構建多元增長動力，同時將白酒業務定位為第二增長曲綫，又預計白酒行業將繼續進行周期性調整。



編輯：張詩民
summary_zh: 華潤啤酒去年盈利下滑29%至33.7億元人民幣，但末期息增至0.557元，全年派息創過去5年新高。

headline: 嘉里建設去年盈利增長16%　基礎盈利跌22%
excerpt:
嘉里建設去年盈利9.38億元，按年增加16%。撇除投資物業的非現金公允價值變動影響，基礎盈利20.08億元，按年減少22%，受到辦公室分部租賃表現偏軟及去年稅項增加影響。末期息維持每股0.95元，連同中期股息合計每股1.35元，與去年持平。

期內，收入升0.35%至近196億元。合併收入按年升17%至250.2億元，當中香港的發展物業收入升85%至近118億元，內地發展物業收入跌21%至59億元。香港的租賃物業收入跌11%至11.5億元。由於住宅市場疲弱，內地物業發展的減值撥備4.47億，按年減少55%。

至去年底的負債率33.3%，按年減少8.2個百分點，因為收到多個發展物業項目的銷售款項。

主席郭孔華表示，雖然香港前景看好，但市場情緒依然脆弱，加上中東近期極端地緣政治事件的影響，已在股市及樓市中浮現，集團將維持一貫的審慎策略，優先確保財務穩健，並選擇性把握高質素投資機遇，以支持業務持續增長。

內地市場方面，郭孔華表示，由於整體房地產市場供應嚴重過剩，樓市何時真正回穩、國內投資及消費得以逐步改善，目前仍有待觀察。



編輯：李意琴
summary_zh: 嘉里建設去年盈利按年增長16%至9.38億元，惟基礎盈利下跌22%至20.08億元，受辦公室租賃疲軟及稅項增加影響；公司維持末期息0.95元，全年派息與去年持平。

headline: 港股下午初段跌逾3%
excerpt:
港股下午開市初段跌逾3%，恒生指數較早時報24468點，跌808點，跌幅3.2%。

科技指數報4732點，跌139點，跌幅2.87%。



編輯：李意琴
summary_zh: 港股下午開市初段大幅下跌逾3%，恒生指數跌至24468點，科技指數亦同步下滑。

headline: 立法會議員訪廉署總部　胡英明冀共同努力從根源改變樓宇管理生態
excerpt:
多位新一屆立法會議員到訪廉政公署總部，了解廉署工作及最新肅貪倡廉策略，並就最新反貪工作和廉潔情況交流意見。

廉政專員胡英明歡迎到訪議員時表示，廉署與立法會一直緊密合作，議員的監察、建議和支持對廉署提升工作成效十分重要。

胡英明表示，廉署十分關注近年樓宇管理及維修貪污罪行，當中涉及百萬元至過億元工程，亦涉及為數不少的非法組織和非法手段，廉署除了常設的專責小組外，亦增撥調查人員支援，全力打擊相關罪行。他期望立法會議員共同努力，全面檢視現時的制度，從根源徹底改變現時樓宇管理及維修行業的生態。

立法會議員亦參觀多項廉署設施，包括舉報中心、拘留中心、電腦資料鑑證組、法證會計組和專責調查上市公司貪污罪行的組別，進一步了解廉署人員應用人工智能技術到日常調查工作和最新電子蒐證程序。議員亦到訪廉署室內射擊場，觀察廉署的槍械配備和了解配槍人員執行職務的訓練。

廉署亦將於4月及5月再安排兩場立法會議員訪問活動，務求令更多議員加深了解廉署工作。



編輯：任順熙
summary_zh: 多位立法會議員到訪廉政公署總部，廉政專員胡英明表示廉署將與議員共同努力，從根源改變樓宇管理及維修行業的貪污生態。

headline: 葵涌警員開槍案　男子被控企圖有意圖而傷人及管有攻擊性武器提堂
excerpt:
警方上星期六在葵涌開槍制服一名43歲男子。被捕男子昨日被暫控一項「企圖有意圖而傷人」罪及一項「管有攻擊性武器」罪，案件今日在沙田裁判法院提堂。

案中該名男子手持武器，3名警務人員向他共開5槍，新界南總區重案組繼續積極跟進案件。



編輯：任順熙
summary_zh: 葵涌警員開槍案中，43歲男子因手持武器被警方開5槍制服，今日在沙田裁判法院因企圖有意圖而傷人及管有攻擊性武器罪被提堂。

headline: 利舞臺廣場女廁發現初生男嬰列殺嬰案　警方重案組調查
excerpt:
銅鑼灣利舞臺廣場一個女廁内發現一名初生男嬰，送院後證實不治。案件暫列作殺嬰，警方稍後安排驗屍，以確定死因，灣仔警區重案組正跟進調查。

下午約1時32分，警方接獲清潔工人報案，指在該女廁内垃圾桶發現該名初生嬰兒，他送往律敦治醫院治理，下午2時39分證實死亡。初步檢驗顯示，該名初生男嬰，連有臍帶。



編輯：任順熙
summary_zh: 銅鑼灣利舞臺廣場女廁發現初生男嬰遺體，警方列為殺嬰案並由重案組調查。

headline: 地盤擬全面禁煙違例可被罰款3千元　預計年中將修例交立法會審議
excerpt:
勞工及福利局與勞工處向立法會人力事務委員會提交推行地盤全面禁煙法例修訂建議， 勞工處將會把建築地盤指定為《吸煙（公眾衞生）條例 》的法定禁煙區，違例者將被罰款3千元，另外亦建議修訂《工廠及工業經營條例》下的《建築地盤（安全）規例》，管理地盤的承建商須採取所有合理步驟，確保無人於地盤內吸用或攜帶燃著的吸煙產品，違例承建商一經定罪，最高可按現行規例罰款40萬元。

文件提到，在個別情節嚴重的情况，例如有人在高度易燃物品附近吸煙而構成嚴重火警風險，勞工處會考慮使用《工廠及工業經營條例》的一般責任條款起訴涉及的東主或僱員。按現有《條例》罰則，一般責任條款下一經法院定罪，東主可處罰款300萬元及監禁6個月，僱員可處罰款15萬元及監禁6個月。

勞工處將「建築地盤」，包括正在施工的新建築物或基礎設施，以及進行裝修及維修工程的建築物，納入為指定禁止吸煙區後，相關禁煙條款將適用於建築地盤所有區域。勞工處將專責所有涉及在建築地盤的吸煙罪行執法工作。

文件指，勞工處正全速推行修訂有關法例工作，預計今年中將修例建議提交立法會審議。



編輯：任順熙
summary_zh: 勞工處建議將建築地盤列為法定禁煙區，違例吸煙者將被罰款3千元，承建商違例最高罰款40萬元，預計年中提交立法會審議。

headline: 過去5個月逾萬次反非法勞工行動　鄧炳強稱成效顯著
excerpt:
保安局局長鄧炳強主持「跨部門反黑工專責組」第二次會議，跟進非法勞工的最新情況，包括個別重點行業下與非法工作相關的罪案趨勢，並檢視各項打擊非法勞工措施的實施情況。

身兼專責組組長的鄧炳強表示，自專責組於去年9月成立以來，政府不斷加強打擊非法勞工的力度。去年10月至今年2月的5個月期間共進行超過1萬次反非法勞工行動，月均數字較去年首三季月均上升近三成，當中拘捕約520名非法勞工和約200名僱主或協助以及教唆人士，成效顯著。執法部門同時加大力度宣傳反非法勞工行動的執法成果，以收阻嚇之效。

鄧炳強說，情報收集方面，入境處去年9月推出舉報非法勞工專線，並增設微信及智方便應用程式的舉報方式。為進一步便利市民舉報，入境處簡化舉報專線，推出更方便易記的號碼185 185，以鼓勵市民合力打擊非法勞工。

專責組會繼續密切關注非法勞工的罪案趨勢，適時制定和調整應對策略，針對性打擊多個重點行業的非法勞工，保障本地工人的就業機會。



編輯：任順熙
summary_zh: 香港政府過去5個月進行超過1萬次反非法勞工行動，拘捕逾700人，保安局局長鄧炳強表示成效顯著。

headline: 宏福苑獨立委員會下月將舉行第二輪及第三輪共13場聽證會
excerpt:
大埔宏福苑火災成立的獨立委員會公布，將於4月舉行第二輪及第三輪共13場聽證會，聽取證據。聽證會繼續在中環展城館進行，委員會會在第二輪及第三輪聽證會，繼續聽取證人的口述證供，包括宏福苑居民及涉事方代表的口述證供。

第二輪6場聽證會的日期為4月8、10、13、15至17日；第三輪7場聽證會的日期則為4月20至24日，以及4月27及30日。

委員會將適時於其網頁公布每場聽證會會出席作證的證人具體名單。聽證會將預留部分座位予涉事方，並會開放名額予公眾人士旁聽。主場地和兩個轉播區共可提供約360個公眾人士旁聽名額，而當中約一半名額會優先分配予宏福苑居民，傳媒則另行安排。
 
就第二輪聽證會，公眾人士包括宏福苑居民，須於本月25日上午10時至本月28日上午10時期間，透過網上預約，選取有意旁聽的日子，並遞交登記表格。委員會秘書處會根據系統接收登記表格的時間紀錄，按先到先得的原則分配名額。
 
第三輪聽證會的網上預約安排會隨後公布。而按現時計劃，委員會將繼續在5月舉行聽證會，聽證會的具體日期、會出席作證的證人，以及公眾旁聽預約安排會稍後另行公布。



編輯：任順熙
summary_zh: 大埔宏福苑火災獨立委員會將於4月舉行第二、三輪共13場聽證會，繼續聽取居民及涉事方證供，並開放公眾旁聽。

headline: 行李藏52公斤受管制瀕危物種乾魚翅　28歲旅客被海關拘捕
excerpt:
海關在機場檢獲約52公斤懷疑屬受管制瀕危物種的乾魚翅，估計市值約21萬元，一名28歲女子被漁護署落案控以一項非法進口附錄II瀕危物種罪。

這名女子昨日從巴西經埃塞俄比亞飛抵本港，她在機場入境大堂被關員截停進行清關檢查。關員在其寄艙行李內發現該批懷疑受管制乾魚翅。經漁護署人員查驗後，懷疑該批乾魚翅屬《瀕危野生動植物種國際貿易公約》所列明的瀕危物種，在本港受《保護瀕危動植物物種條例》所管制。關員將她拘捕，案件轉交漁護署跟進。



編輯：任順熙
summary_zh: 海關在機場檢獲28歲女旅客行李內藏有52公斤受管制瀕危物種乾魚翅，估值約21萬元，女子被漁護署拘捕並落案起訴。

headline: 孫玉菡：「兩蚊兩折」大大改善長車短搭　料下年度可慳5.5億
excerpt:
政府公布在下月3日起，長者及合資格殘疾人士公共交通票價優惠計劃，即二元優惠計劃，由二元劃一收費，調整為「兩蚊兩折」。

勞工及福利局局長孫玉菡相信，新安排可以大大改善「長車短搭」問題，估計下個財政年度可節省大約5.5億元。




編輯：朱錫君
summary_zh: 政府推出「兩蚊兩折」新優惠計劃，長者及殘疾人士公共交通票價調整為二元或二折優惠，料可改善長車短搭問題並節省5.5億元。

headline: 【重溫】2026年3月23日新聞天地
excerpt: 詳盡報道本地時事、大中華消息、國際局勢等新聞，緊貼最新熱話。
summary_zh: 這是2026年3月23日的新聞節目重溫，涵蓋本地時事、大中華消息及國際局勢的詳盡報道。

headline: 科大免費為六千基層長者　檢測早期阿爾茲海默症
excerpt:
香港科技大學推出「長者護腦計劃」，聯同東華學院等機構，透過多間社區中心或長者中心，招募6000名60歲至75歲基層居家長者，參與阿爾茲海默症和輕度認知障礙早期檢測。

科大期望，做到及早識別、並轉介認知障礙患者，銜接現時醫療體系，包括診治和社區層面支援服務。



編輯：朱錫君
summary_zh: 香港科技大學推出「長者護腦計劃」，為6000名基層長者免費檢測早期阿爾茲海默症，期望及早識別患者並轉介至醫療體系。

headline: 昂船洲政府船塢有船隻起火　據了解事發時有工人正維修
excerpt:
昂船洲政府船塢有船隻起火。

警方下午近5時接報，指昂船洲政府船塢内一艘船隻起火。據了解，事發時涉事船隻內有工人正進行維修，暫時未有傷亡報告。

消防處表示，暫時動用兩條喉及兩隊煙帽隊進行灌救。



編輯：任順熙
summary_zh: 昂船洲政府船塢一艘船隻起火，事發時有工人正在進行維修，消防處已出動灌救。

headline: 陳克勤連任民建聯主席　5名副主席維持不變
excerpt:
民建聯公布新一屆領導層，正副主席不變。陳克勤連任主席，5名副主席亦連任，包括陳勇、周浩鼎、陳學鋒、葛珮帆及陳恒鑌。

司庫莊惠明、秘書長葉傲冬亦連任。李聖潑接任盧文端擔任監委會主席，盧文端轉任會務顧問。

陳克勤說，未來工作重點包括配合政府制定香港未來五年規劃、對接國家「十五五」發展、助推人才集聚高地建設、繼續協助政府重點推動大廈維修改革等。

被問到曾任大埔宏福苑法團顧問的黃碧嬌出任監委會成員，會否影響監委會形象，又會否要求她配合出席有關聽證會。陳克勤說，留意到有關獨立委員會有要求黃碧嬌提供相關資料，該黨亦已要求黃碧嬌全力配合委員會工作，由於調查仍在進行，不便評論。他說，如果調查結果發現有民建聯成員涉及不恰當行為，將嚴肅處理、絕不姑息。



編輯：任順熙
summary_zh: 民建聯公布新一屆領導層，陳克勤連任主席，5名副主席及司庫、秘書長等主要幹部均維持不變。

headline: 考評局：無發現考生刻意破壞DSE英語口試試場秩序　籲勿信傳言
excerpt:
考評局表示，DSE英國語文科口試上周已順利完成，截至目前，沒有發現考生刻意破壞試場秩序與考試進行的情況，呼籲不要輕信網上傳言，以免影響備試心情。

考評局在網誌表示，對於近日社交媒體上有留言指，部分考生在小組討論時曾作出干擾其他考生發言的行為，考評局強調，一直密切監察2026年DSE的整體運作，今年局方於25間學校設立一般試場及30間學校設立特別試場，安排超過53000名考生應考，各試場的考試均順利舉行。

考評局又指，說話能力考試採用「雙評制」，由兩位口試主考員依據評核準則，按每位考生在兩部分的整體表現作出獨立評分。因此每位考生的評分不會因其他考生的表現而受到影響。而說話能力考試過程會被錄影，如兩位主考員的評分差異高於預設的分數差異門檻，考評局將於考試後安排另一主考員根據相關的考試錄影進行第三評，以確保評分公平與可靠。

考評局亦設有既定程序，確保所有考生在自由發言時得到適當的發言機會。若發現有任何考生壟斷發言或作出違規行為，主考員會即時作出跟進，並對有關考生的評分作出適當的處理。局方強調，考生在應考時表現有所不同，並不屬於考試異常情況。若考生認為考試時有偏離既定的考試程序，亦可向考
summary_zh: 考評局否認DSE英語口試有考生刻意破壞試場秩序，呼籲公眾勿信網上傳言，並強調採用雙評制及錄影機制確保評分公平。

headline: 本港提升伊朗及以色列外遊警示至黑色　卡塔爾及阿聯酋等黃色警示
excerpt:
鑑於中東地區局勢持續惡化，特區政府今日提升伊朗及以色列的外遊警示級別至黑色，並向巴林、約旦、阿曼、卡塔爾、沙特阿拉伯及阿聯酋發出黃色外遊警示。

政府發言人表示，黑色外遊警示級別表示有嚴重威脅，由於伊朗及以色列的安全形勢極不明朗，特區政府呼籲市民不應前赴當地。身在伊朗及以色列的港人應注意人身安全，並盡快撤離或轉移至相對安全區域。此外，計劃前赴或已在巴林、約旦、阿曼、卡塔爾、沙特阿拉伯及阿聯酋的港人亦應留意局勢，提高警惕，注意安全，並留意當地就最新情況的公布及中國駐當地使領館發布的領事服務信息。

雖然科威特現時不涵蓋於外遊警示制度內，保安局亦已更新外遊警示網頁有關科威特的附加資料，提醒市民提高警惕，注意安全。

保安局會繼續密切留意相關中東國家的局勢，如有進一步消息，當局會透過媒體、保安局流動應用程式及外遊警示網頁（www.sb.gov.hk/chi/ota）發布當地最新情況。



編輯：任順熙
summary_zh: 香港特區政府因中東局勢惡化，提升伊朗及以色列外遊警示至最高級別黑色，並對卡塔爾、阿聯酋等六國發出黃色警示，促請港人避免前往或盡快撤離。

headline: 陳國基督導政策局以快、實、準原則推進香港五年規劃工作
excerpt:
政務司司長陳國基表示，特區政府正密鑼緊鼓全面推進對接國家「十五五」規劃的工作，他先後主持兩場籌備會議，督導並統籌協調轄下九個政策局，以「快、實、準」的原則，全速推進「香港五年規劃」的籌劃編制工作，務求發揮行政主導的治理效能，帶領香港把握好契機，將中央支持和國家發展提供的龐大機遇，轉化為實實在在的成果。

陳國基在社交專頁提到，他在會議上強調，各政策局必須主動、高效對接國家戰略要求，在規劃推動社會、經濟、民生發展的過程中，充分發揮「一國兩制」下的獨特優勢，實現以「香港所長」服務「國家所需」的戰略目標。而各政策局已陸續就各自政策範疇訂定未來五年的發展願景與核心框架，目標今年內高質量完成首份屬於香港的行動綱領，綱領既要全面承接國家的戰略部署，亦要切實回應社會對香港邁向高質量發展的殷切期盼，政府將透過不同渠道諮詢持份者及公眾意見，確保規劃既高瞻遠矚和切實可行。

陳國基表示，中央在《十五五規劃綱要》中，明確支持香港鞏固提升國際金融、航運、貿易中心及國際航空樞紐地位，亦明確支持香港加快北部都會區建設，以及打造國際高端人才集聚高地，為香港發展展示廣闊前景、注入強勁動能，也對特區政府的統籌推進能力提
summary_zh: 陳國基督導政策局以「快、實、準」原則推進香港五年規劃工作，對接國家「十五五」規劃，目標今年內完成首份行動綱領。

headline: 陳茂波與商務部官員在北京共同主持內地與香港經貿合作委員會會議
excerpt:
財政司司長陳茂波在北京與國家商務部部長助理袁曉明共同主持內地與香港經貿合作委員會第八次會議，會議首次在北京以實體方式舉行。會議回顧過去一年內地與香港經貿合作的進展，並商議委員會未來的工作，包括《內地與香港關於建立更緊密經貿關係的安排》的落實情況、共同推進粵港澳大灣區建設 、支持香港參與共建「一帶一路」與區域經濟合作等。

商務及經濟發展局局長丘應樺、「一帶一路」專員何力治等參與會議。

陳茂波完成在北京的訪問行程，今日下午啓程回港。



編輯：譚佩貞
summary_zh: 陳茂波與商務部官員在北京共同主持內地與香港經貿合作委員會第八次會議，首次以實體方式舉行，並就CEPA落實、大灣區建設及一帶一路合作等議題進行商議。
keywords_zh: 內地與香港經貿合作委員會

headline: 習近平考察雄安新區　指要因地制宜發展新質生產力
excerpt:
中共總書記習近平考察河北雄安新區，主持召開深入推進雄安新區高質量建設和發展座談會，並發表重要講話。

習近平表示，雄安新區建設和發展取得重大階段性成果，實踐充分證明，黨中央關於建設雄安新區的決策完全正確，各方面工作扎實有效，深入推進雄安新區高質量建設和發展，必須堅持新區功能定位，更加有力有序推進北京非首都功能疏解和承接。

習近平指出，雄安新區要以改革創新為動力，推動科技創新與產業創新深度融合，因地制宜發展新質生產力，培育符合新區實際的現代化產業體系。要高水平建設雄安中關村科技園，推動更多科創成果轉化落地。推動新興產業和未來產業集群式發展，積極發展生產性服務業，支持傳統產業改造升級。

他又說，要大膽探索、先行先試，推動科技、金融等領域創新政策率先落地，著力打造市場化法治化國際化營商環境。




編輯：許敬軒
summary_zh: 習近平考察雄安新區，主持座談會強調要因地制宜發展新質生產力，推動科技創新與產業創新融合，加快推進北京非首都功能疏解。

headline: 伊朗稱若發電站遭襲將對等回應　中方：戰事擴大將陷不可收拾局面
excerpt:
伊朗革命衛隊重申，若果美國襲擊伊朗的發電站，伊朗將會對等打擊以色列的發電站，以及為美軍基地供電的地區國家發電站。

革命衛隊發表聲明，指特朗普說要攻擊伊朗的發電站，將會導致醫院、救援站、供水網絡及淡水廠等諸多民生服務陷入癱瘓，實屬非人道之舉。伊朗鄭重宣告一旦伊方發電站遭襲，必將予以報復，而且說到做到。

特朗普當地星期六晚在社交媒體發文，要求伊朗48小時內開放霍爾木茲海峽，否則會摧毀伊朗各類發電站。

特朗普星期日又與英國首相施紀賢通電話，唐寧街首相府表示，雙方討論到中東局勢，一致認為重新開放霍爾木茲海峽對確保全球能源市場的穩定至關重要。

在北京，外交部發言人林劍表示，中東戰火仍在蔓延外溢，如果戰事持續擴大，局勢再度升級，整個地區將會陷入不可收拾的局面，武力只會導致惡性循環，中方強烈呼籲當事方立即停止軍事行動，回歸對話談判，不要讓這場本就不應該開始的戰爭繼續落去。




編輯：許敬軒
summary_zh: 伊朗革命衛隊揚言若發電站遭襲將對等報復以色列，特朗普要求開放霍爾木茲海峽否則摧毀伊朗電力設施，中方呼籲停止軍事升級。

headline: 貴州省赫章縣交通事故致學生2死11傷　國務院要求提級調查
excerpt:
貴州省畢節市赫章縣發生交通事故，初步確認已經導致2名學生死亡，11名學生受傷。國務院安委辦對事故查處掛牌督辦，要求貴州省對事故提級調查。

事發在今早7時許，接報後，應急管理部有關負責人立即作出部署，要求千方百計救治傷員，最大限度減少傷亡；盡快查明事故原因，依法依規嚴肅追責問責。應急管理部已會同教育部、公安部組成工作組趕赴現場指導處置。




編輯︰張萬燕
summary_zh: 貴州赫章縣發生校車交通事故造成學生2死11傷，國務院安委辦要求提級調查並掛牌督辦。

headline: 學者倡澳門要從制度法規對接思考　突破目前琴澳合作發展
excerpt:
全國人大會議本月中閉幕時，表決通過國家「十五五」規劃綱要，當中繼續載列港澳專章。

有澳區全國人大代表和澳門立法議員認為，未來港澳可以加強溝通，以便更好分工，共同發展；而橫琴便利通關後，年輕人亦會增加就業機會。有學者就建議，澳門政府和社會未來要從制度法規對接再多思考，以突破目前琴澳合作發展。





編輯：黃佩珊
summary_zh: 全國人大會議通過「十五五」規劃綱要，澳區代表倡議澳門應從制度法規對接著手，突破琴澳合作發展瓶頸。

headline: 習近平致電巴基斯坦總統　祝賀巴基斯坦國慶日
excerpt:
國家主席習近平致電巴基斯坦總統扎爾達里，祝賀巴基斯坦伊斯蘭共和國國慶日。

習近平強調，今年是中國「十五五」開局之年，也是中巴建交75周年。希望雙方賡續傳統友誼，加強戰略溝通和發展戰略對接，在各自現代化道路上攜手前行。他高度重視中巴關係發展，願同扎爾達里總統一道努力，加快構建新時代更加緊密的中巴命運共同體，更好造福兩國人民。

習近平指出，長期以來，巴基斯坦政府和人民堅定維護國家主權、獨立、領土完整和民族尊嚴，戰勝各種風險挑戰，推進國家建設，為促進地區和平穩定和發展繁榮作出貢獻。作為親密朋友，中方對巴方取得的發展成就由衷感到高興。



編輯︰張萬燕
summary_zh: 習近平致電巴基斯坦總統扎爾達里祝賀國慶日，強調中巴建交75周年，望加強戰略合作構建新時代命運共同體。

source_name: 香港政府新聞網 — 財經
headline: 陳茂波完成北京訪問
excerpt: 財政司司長陳茂波今日上午在北京與國家商務部部長助理袁曉明共同主持內地與香港經貿合作委員會第八次會議。陳茂波同日完成北京訪問行程，下午啟程回港。 是次為會議首次在北京以實體方式舉行。會議回顧過去一年內地與香港經貿合作的進展，並商議委員會未來的工作，包括《內地與香港關於建立更緊密經貿關係的安排》的落實情況、共同推進粵港澳大灣區建設 、支持香港參與共建 「一帶一路 」與區域經濟合作等。 商務及經濟發展局局長丘應樺和「一帶一路」專員何力治參與會議。
summary_zh: 財政司司長陳茂波在北京與商務部官員主持內地與香港經貿合作委員會第八次會議，討論CEPA落實、大灣區建設及一帶一路合作等議題。

source_name: 香港政府新聞網 — 財經
headline: 郵費4月13日起上調
excerpt: 香港郵政宣布下月13日起 調整郵費 ，其中30克或以下本地信件的郵費由2.2元調升至2.4元。 空郵信件方面，20克或以下寄往中國內地和台灣的郵費由3.7元增至3.9元；寄往其他地區的郵費由4元至5.5元增至4.2元至5.8元不等。 至於平郵信件，20克或以下寄往中國內地、澳門、台灣的郵費由2.8元上調至3元；寄往其他地區則由3.5元至5.3元上調至3.7元至5.6元不等。 香港郵政表示，為彌補不斷上升的營運成本，尤其是主要成本項目包括航運費和終端費上升，郵費有需要定期調整。是次加幅大致反映自2022年9月收費調整至2026年1月的累計通脹。總體而言，逾九成本地郵件和平郵郵件的郵費加幅在0.2元之內，約九成空郵郵件的郵費加幅在0.5元之內，相信加幅對市民及商界的影響非常輕微。
summary_zh: 香港郵政宣布4月13日起調整郵費，本地信件、空郵及平郵信件的郵資全面上調，以應對營運成本上升。

headline: Watch Energy Secretary Wright discuss Iran war after Trump postpones power plant strikes
excerpt: Wright's comments Monday come after Trump threatened to bomb Iran's power plants if the Islamic Republic's leaders do not fully open the Strait of Hormuz.
full_text:
[This stream is scheduled to begin at 9:40 a.m. ET]

HOUSTON — U.S. Energy Secretary Chris Wright will speak Monday at an energy conference, as financial markets hope President Donald Trump is signalling the Iran war could soon end.

Top oil executives, senior U.S. government officials and influential policymakers from around the world are gathering in Houston, Texas, for S&P Global's annual CERAWeek conference. The gathering takes place as the Iran war has triggered the largest oil supply disruption in history.

Wright's comments Monday come after Trump said he would delay strikes on Iran's power plants for five days following "productive" conversations with the Islamic Republic. The president told CNBC that the U.S. is "very intent on making a deal with Iran."

The president had threatened Saturday to bomb Iranian power infrastructure if Tehran did not fully open the Strait of Hormuz. Iran warned it would retaliate against "all infrastructure of energy, information technology, and desalination facilities" in the region belonging to the U.S. and Israel, according to state media.

Oil tanker traffic through the Strait has plunged as Iran attacks commercial ships in the Persian Gulf. The Strait is the most important sea route for oil exports in the world. About 20% of global supplies passed through the narrow waterway before the war.

The hardline rhetoric from the U.S. and Iran has stoked fears that energy infrastructure in the Middle East will face renewed attacks that exacerbate the supply disruption. But Trump's Monday comments raised market hopes that there still might be a path to de-escalate the war. Oil prices cratered Monday, while Dow futures jumped. The 10-year Treasury yield moved lower.
summary_zh: 美國能源部長Wright在德州休斯頓能源會議上發表評論，涉及Trump延遲轟炸伊朗核電廠及伊朗戰爭前景。

source_name: 香港政府新聞網 — 財經
headline: 裕澤香江高峰論壇明日舉行
excerpt: 政府今日舉行高峰晚宴，宴請約130名來自亞洲、歐洲、美洲、大洋洲和非洲的家族辦公室決策人及家族成員，為明日舉行、以「築就傳承」為主題的第四屆裕澤香江高峰論壇拉開帷幕。 行政長官李家超致歡迎辭時表示，越來越多家族辦公室選擇落戶香港，目前全港已匯聚超過3,380間單一家族辦公室，較兩年前增長達25%，其中逾半數的領導層已由第二代或以後的成員擔任，充分反映超高淨值家族對香港作為跨代傳承基地的堅定信心。 晚宴開始由一場別開生面的「人機共舞醒獅」帶動氣氛。在融合傳統精粹與創新的氛圍下，出席高峰晚宴的來賓享受美食的同時也熾熱互動。 明日，來自全球的家族辦公室決策人和家族繼承人將圍繞「資管優勢成就家族財富傳承」、「文化價值基礎孕育蓬勃市場」和「智能科技創新驅動資本增值」三大核心議題，以及「體育與慈善」爐邊談話探索講者的前瞻思維。這些智慧交流將為與會者帶來嶄新角度以延續傳承財富，鞏固香港作為全球頂級家族辦公室中心和家族實現跨代傳承的首選樞紐地位。
summary_zh: 政府舉辦高峰晚宴為第四屆裕澤香江高峰論壇揭幕，逾130名全球家族辦公室決策人出席；港府強調香港已聚集逾3,380間單一家族辦公室，成為全球頂級跨代傳承樞紐。
